Hace once años un pavoroso incendio acabó con la familia de Alicia y la dejó terriblemente trastornada. Más tarde fue internada en el Manicomio Rutledge, donde sufrió para hacer frente a sus demonios adentrándose aún más en su mundo de fantasía, el País de las Maravillas. Ahora, después de diez años, finalmente ha logrado asegurar su liberación. Pero aún carga con el gran daño psicológico de aquel trágico evento.
 Con su mente hecha jirones, es incapaz de enfrentarse al miedo provocado por sus extraños recuerdos, sueños y visiones. Quizás lo haga mejor en el País de las Maravillas. Siempre ha sido así. Suele viajar allí buscando lo que el mundo "real" no le puede proporcionar: seguridad, conocimiento y la verdad acerca del pasado. Pero durante su ausencia, el País de las Maravillas también ha sufrido lo suyo. Algo ha ido terriblemente mal y ahora una gran maldad se cierne sobre lo que antaño fuera su hermoso refugio. ¿Puede Alicia salvar al País de las Maravillas (y a ella misma) de la locura que los consume? Características Principales:  Intensa acción en tercera persona: 
   Utiliza múltiples armas cuerpo a cuerpo mejorables, incluyendo el Cañón Tetera, el Caballo Hobby castigador y la clásica Hoja Vorpal.   Explora un País de las Maravillas oscuro y destrozado: 
   Encuentra personajes familiares pero ahora extraños, incluyendo el Gato Cheshire, el Sombrerero Loco, la Oruga y la Reina Roja.   Habilidades mágicas: 
   Obtén peculiares habilidades en el País de las Maravillas como la capacidad de flotar con el vestido de Alicia, encogerte y crecer hasta un tamaño gigantesco para aplastar a tus enemigos.   Puzles interactivos: 
   Intuitivos y gratificantes puzles como la transformación de obstáculos, los recuerdos musicales, el ajedrez y los bloques de imágenes.

Onze ans plus tôt, un terrible incendie a emporté la famille d’Alice et a laissé d’effroyables cicatrices dans son esprit. À la suite du drame, elle a été internée à l’asile de Rutledge, où elle a lutté contre ses démons en s’enfonçant de plus en plus dans son monde imaginaire du Pays des Merveilles. Dix ans plus tard, Alice est enfin autorisée à sortir, mais elle porte encore le lourd fardeau psychologique de ce tragique évènement.
 Son esprit en lambeaux, elle est incapable d’affronter la peur que provoquent ses étranges souvenirs, rêves et visions. Peut-être s’en sortira-t-elle mieux au Pays des Merveilles. Ça a toujours été le cas. Elle se rend là-bas à la recherche de ce que le monde « réel » ne peut pas lui offrir : sécurité, connaissance, et vérité sur le passé. Mais en son absence, le Pays des Merveilles a, lui aussi, souffert. Quelque chose a mal tourné, et maintenant un grand mal s’abat sur ce qui fut son refuge magnifique. Alice peut-elle sauver le Pays des Merveilles (ainsi qu'elle-même) de la folie qui les ronge tous les deux ? Caractéristiques :  Intense jeu d’action à la 3ème personne : 
   Utilisez toute une gamme d’armes de mêlée à améliorer, dont le Canon Théière explosif, Le Cheval de Bataille vengeur, la classique Épée Vorpale.   Explorez un Pays des Merveilles sombre et brisé : 
   Rencontrez des personnages familiers devenus étranges, notamment le Chat du Cheshire, le Chapelier Fou, La Chenille et la Reine Rouge.   Pouvoirs magiques : 
   Obtenez des pouvoir magiques propres au Pays des Merveilles tels que flotter avec la robe d’Alice, rapetisser ou grandir à des tailles impressionnantes afin d’écraser vos ennemis.   Puzzles interactifs : 
   Puzzles intuitifs et encourageants comme des obstacles à transformer, des jeux de mémoire musicaux, les échecs et des blocs d’images à assembler.

Vor elf Jahren nahm ein fürchterliches Feuer Alice die Familie und hinterließ tiefe Narben in ihrem Geist. Sie wurde in der Rutledge-Irrenanstalt weggesperrt, wo sie sich mühte, ihre Dämonen zu bekämpfen, dabei aber immer tiefer in ihre Fantasiewelt abglitt – ins Wunderland. Jetzt, nach zehn Jahren, wird sie endlich entlassen – trägt jedoch noch immer schwer an der Last der Tragödie.
 Ihr Verstand ist zerschmettert; sie kann die Angst, die durch seltsame Erinnerungen, Träume und Visionen genährt wird, nicht zähmen. Vielleicht ginge es ihr im Wunderland besser. So wie früher. Sie reist dorthin und sucht, was ihr die "Realität" nicht bieten kann: Sicherheit, Erkenntnis und die Wahrheit über die Vergangenheit. Während ihrer Abwesenheit hat allerdings auch das Wunderland leiden müssen. Irgendetwas ist gehörig schiefgegangen, und jetzt sucht eine böse Macht ihren einstigen Zufluchtsort heim. Kann Alice das Wunderland – und sich selbst – vor dem Wahnsinn bewahren, der beide zerfrisst? HAUPTEIGENSCHAFTEN:  Intensive 3rd-Person-Action: 
   Verschiedene verbesserungsfähige Waffen, inklusive der explosiven Teekannone, dem vergeltenden Steckenpferd und der klassischen Vorpal-Klinge.   Erkunden Sie ein düsteres und erschüttertes Wunderland: 
   Begegnen Sie vertrauten, nun jedoch befremdlichen Geschöpfen wie der Grinsekatze, dem Hutmacher, der Raupe und der Roten Königin.   Magische Fähigkeiten: 
   Eignen Sie sich im Wunderland besondere Fähigkeiten an: beispielsweise das Gleiten mit dem Kleid von Alice, das Schrumpfen oder auch das Wachsen ins Riesenhafte, um Gegner zu zerschmettern.   Interaktive Rätsel: 
   Intuitiv zu lösende und erhellende Rätsel wie das Manipulieren von Hindernissen, das Einprägen von Musik, Schach- und Blockpuzzle-Aufgaben.

Há onze anos atrás um horrível incêndio levou a família de Alice, o que lhe deixou a mente horrivelmente cicatrizada. Mais tarde ela foi mandada para o manicómio de Rutledge, onde ela tentou confrontar os seus demónios, deslizando ainda mais num mundo de fantasia no País das Maravilhas. 
 Ao fim de dez anos, ela finalmente pôde sair, mas ainda assim ela ainda carregava o pesado fardo psicológico daquele evento trágico.
 Com a sua mente em farrapos, ela é incapaz de resolver o medo instigado pelas suas memórias estranhas, sonhos e visões. Talvez ela esteja melhor no País das Maravilhas. Ela sempre esteve. Ela viaja para lá, procurando o que o mundo "real" não lhe pode fornecer: o conhecimento, segurança e a verdade sobre o passado. Mas, na sua ausência, o País das Maravilhas também sofreu. Algo errado aconteceu, e agora um grande mal está a descer sobre o que já foi seu bonito refúgio. Poderá a Alice salvar o País das Maravilhas e de si mesma à loucura que consome ambos? Características principais :  Ação intensa na terceira pessoa: 
   Usa várias armas modificáveis ​de corpo a corpo, incluindo o explosivo Teapot Cannon, o implacável Hobby Horse e a clássica Vorpal Blade.   Explora o mundo negro e arruinado do País das Maravilhas: 
   Encontra personagens familiares, mas agora estranhas, incluindo o Gato de Cheshire, o Chapeleiro Louco, a Lagarta e a Rainha Vermelha.   Habilidades mágicas: 
   Obtém habilidades peculiares no País das Maravilhas, tais como flutuar com o vestido de Alice, encolher, ou crescer para tamanhos enormes para esmagares os inimigos.   Quebra-cabeças interativos: 
   Quebra-cabeças intuitivos e recompensadores como obstáculos que se transformam, memórias musicais, xadrez e blocos de imagens.

11年前の凄惨な火事が、アリスから家族を奪い、彼女の心に恐ろしい傷跡を残しました。その後彼女は、ラトリッジ閉鎖病棟に閉じ込められました。そこで彼女は不思議の国の幻想的な世界へ入り込み、彼女自身の悪魔に立ち向かいました。10年後の今、彼女はついに解放されました……しかし彼女はまだその悲劇的な出来事の心理的な重荷を背負っています。
 彼女の心はずたずたで、奇妙な記憶や夢や幻想によって駆り立てられる恐怖を解決することができません。おそらく彼女は、不思議の国でならうまくやっていけるでしょう。彼女はいままでもそうしてきました。彼女は「現実」世界が提供できないもの：安寧、知識、そして過去の真実を求めて、その世界を旅します。しかし彼女の不在で、不思議の国も苦しんでいます。何かが恐ろしく間違い、いま強大な悪がかつて彼女の美しい隠れ家だった場所を襲っています。アリスは不思議の国と……そして彼女自身を……ともに食らい尽くそうとする狂気から救い出せるでしょうか? 主な特徴:  特徴的な三人称視点アクション: 
   爆発するティーポットキャノン、お仕置き木馬、そして伝統的なボーパルブレードなどの、アップグレード可能な複数の近接武器を使ってください。   暗く、崩壊した不思議の国の探索: 
   チェシャ猫、狂った帽子屋、イモムシ、そして赤の女王などの、よく知っている奇妙な登場人物たちとの遭遇。   魔法の能力: 
   不思議の国では、アリスのドレスによって、浮かんだり、縮んだり、敵を粉砕するために塔のように大きくなったりといった特殊な能力を得られます。   相互的なパズル: 
   障害物の変形や音楽の記憶、チェス、絵のブロックなどの、直感的で解き甲斐のあるパズル。

 					  Obtain peculiar abilities in Wonderland such as floating with Alice’s dress, shrinking, or growing to towering sizes in order to crush enemies.
 					   Interactive puzzles: 
 					  Intuitive and rewarding puzzles such as transforming obstacles, musical memories, chess, and picture blocks.
2011 video game, sequel to American McGee's Alice
videojuego de 2011
jeu vidéo de 2011
Computerspiel aus dem Jahr 2011
jogo eletrônico de 2011

Return to Wonderland and experience an all new nightmare as Alice fights to regain her sanity as she fights for the truth behind her past. Can Alice save Wonderland - and herself - from the madness that consumes them both?

Within events of the first game, Alice Liddell, believing herself responsible for a fire that consumed her home and her family, escapes into a twisted version of Wonderland. While held at Rutledge Asylum for treatment, Alice was able to conquer her doubts, and eventually was released from the ward. Madness Returns takes place in 1875, a year after Alice's release. Alice, now 19 years old,[6] resides at an orphanage in Victorian London, under the care of Dr. Angus Bumby, a psychiatrist who uses hypnosis to help his child patients forget their memories. Though she believes that she is fine, Alice still suffers from hallucinations of Wonderland.

During an errand, Alice is struck by a hallucination and believes herself to be in Wonderland again. Though initially idyllic, the peaceful land quickly becomes corrupted by the Infernal Train that rampages through it, leaving behind the Ruin, a force that attempts to stop Alice. Alice meets with the Cheshire Cat who affirms that it is some outside force, not Alice, that has caused this corruption, and urges her to seek out former friends and foes to discover the source of the Train. Throughout the rest of the game, Alice briefly returns to reality between episodes occurring within Wonderland. In the real world, Alice learns from the family lawyer that her sister, Elizabeth (nicknamed "Lizzie"), was first to die in the fire, despite being the farthest from its source, and had been locked in her room.

Within the corrupted Wonderland, Alice attempts to learn more from Wonderland's various citizens, including the Duchess, the Mad Hatter, the Mock Turtle, the Walrus and the Carpenter, and the Caterpillar. She is ultimately told that the Queen of Hearts still lives despite her defeat at Alice's hands before, though in a diminished capacity. At the Queen's castle, Alice discovers the Queen's true form, which resembles her younger self. The Queen reveals that an entity called the Dollmaker has taken over the Infernal Train and is corrupting Wonderland.

Returning to London, Alice starts to recall her memories of the night of the fire and realizes that Dr. Bumby was there. He is responsible for the death of her sister and her whole family. She comes to the conclusion that Dr. Bumby is attempting to erase the memories of the fire from her mind and, as he has done with other children, trying to leave her as a "blank toy" to be taken by abusive masters and child molesters for a price. Furious, Alice confronts both Dr. Bumby in the real world at the Moorgate station and Dr. Bumby's Wonderland counterpart, the Dollmaker, in her fantasy on the Infernal Train. Dr. Bumby admits to his crimes, and even attests to setting Alice's home on fire after Lizzie refused his advances, removing any witnesses to his having raped her that night. He points out that by wiping out her Wonderland, he will make her forget the events of that night, while he will continue as a member of high society. Alice defeats the Dollmaker in Wonderland, giving her the strength in the real world and in her mind to push Dr. Bumby into the path of an oncoming train, killing him.

As Alice leaves the station, she finds herself in a hybrid vision of London mixed with Wonderland, Londerland. Alice wanders into the unknown terrain as the Cheshire Cat monologues that Alice has found the truth that was "worth the pain fighting for", and Wonderland, though damaged, is safe for the time being.

Eleven years ago a horrific fire took Alice’s family from her and left her mind horrifically scarred. Afterwards she was confined to Rutledge Asylum, where she struggled to confront her demons by slipping further into her fantasy world of Wonderland. Now, after ten years, she has finally secured her release—yet she still bears the heavy psychological burden of that tragic event.
 
 With her mind in tatters, she is unable to resolve the fear prompted by her strange memories, dreams, and visions. Perhaps she’ll do better in Wonderland. She always has. She travels there, seeking what the “real” world can’t provide: security, knowledge, and the truth about the past. But in her absence, Wonderland too has suffered. Something has gone horribly wrong, and now a great evil is descending upon what once was her beautiful refuge. Can Alice save Wonderland—and herself—from the madness that consumes them both?
 					 Key Features: 					 Intense 3rd person action: 
 					  Use multiple upgradeable melee weapons, including the explosive Teapot Cannon, the punishing Hobby Horse, and the classic Vorpal Blade.
 					   Explore a dark and shattered Wonderland: 
 					  Encounter familiar but now strange characters, including the Cheshire Cat, the Mad Hatter, the Caterpillar and the Red Queen.
 					   Magical abilities: 
 					  Obtain peculiar abilities in Wonderland such as floating with Alice’s dress, shrinking, or growing to towering sizes in order to crush enemies.
 					   Interactive puzzles: 
 					  Intuitive and rewarding puzzles such as transforming obstacles, musical memories, chess, and picture blocks.

Undici anni fa un terribile incendio strappò via ad Alice la sua famiglia lasciando la sua mente terribilmente segnata.
 Con la mente in frantumi, si ritrova incapace di risolvere la paura evocata dalle sue strane memorie, sogni e visioni. Forse le andrà meglio nel Paese delle Meraviglie. E' sempre stato così. Si reca lì, in cerca di ciò che il mondo "reale" non può darle: sicurezza, conoscenza, e la verità sul passato. Ma in sua assenza, anche il Paese delle Meraviglie ha sofferto. Qualcosa è andato terribilmente storto, e ora un grande male sta per calare su quel che una volta era il suo incantevole rifugio. Riuscirà Alice a salvare il Paese delle Meraviglie - e sè stessa - dalla pazzia che li consuma entrambi? Caratteristiche Principali:  Intensa azione in terza persona: 
   Usa e potenzia una moltitudine di armi, inclusi il Cannone Teiera, il terribile Cavallo Giocattolo e la classica Spada Vorpal.   Esplora un Paese delle Meraviglie dalle tinte dark ed in rovina: 
    Incontra personaggi familiari ma ora estranei, come il Gatto del Cheshire, il Cappellaio Matto, il Bruco, e la Regina di Cuori.   Abilità magiche: 
   Ottieni particolari abilità nel Paese delle Meraviglie come planare col vestito di Alice, rimpicciolirsi, o crescere fino a dimensioni colossali per schiacciare i nemici.   Puzzle interattivi: 
   Puzzle intuitivi e gratificanti quali trasformare ostacoli, giochi di memoria musicale, scacchi e picture blocks.

title: Once Human
description:
Once Human is a multiplayer open-world survival game set in a strange, post-apocalyptic future. Unite with friends to fight monstrous enemies, uncover secret plots, compete for resources, and build your own territory. Once, you were merely human. Now, you have the power to remake the world.

Unveiled by the research group Rosetta, "Stardust" is no ordinary substance. It is intricately linked to a host of weird phenomena that defy comprehension. Initially heralded as a catalyst for tech development, Rosetta's exploration of stardust ultimately triggered "Starfall": an eruption of the Great Ones burst forth from Rosetta's experimental monolith, disseminating "Stardust" far and wide. This unleashed a chain of anomalies: from biological mutations to societal disorder and the abrupt collapse of human civilization.
However, a special group of individuals infected by stardust did not lose their sanity or mutate. Instead, they emerged with abilities and became known as "Metas". They soon became essential in the struggle against stardust and the endeavor to revive civilization.

However, due to differing ideologies, the "Metas" split into different factions.

Some, adhering to Rosetta’s idea of continuously evolving by absorbing deviant energy, choose to continue to serve Rosetta, and are known as the "Evolutionists".
Some admire the greatness of the Great One and escape Rosetta to welcome the arrival of the lords of the Great One, known as the "Ascendants".
Still, others hope to explore a new order that harmonizes with the deviations and deviants. You are one of them, and the organization you belong to is known as the "Mayfly".

In a world teeming with deviations, the new order is written by you.

title: Neon White
description:
Neon White is a lightning fast first-person action game about exterminating demons in Heaven. You are White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven. The other assassins seem familiar, though… did you know them in a past life?

You are Neon White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven - Only the fastest slayer can stay.

localized_description.text:
Neon White is a lightning fast first-person action game about exterminating demons in Heaven. You are White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven. The other assassins seem familiar, though… did you know them in a past life?

You are Neon White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven - Only the fastest slayer can stay.
由Ben Esposito开发的第一人称动作平台游戏《Neon White》预计于今冬登陆NS&Steam平台！你在游戏中的使命是消灭天堂里的恶魔。你将化身为来自地狱的刺客 White，与其他屠魔者争夺永居天堂的一线机会。其他刺客看起来都有点眼熟，但是...他们是否都是你前世所熟识的人？

Neon White is a lightning fast first-person action game about exterminating demons in Heaven. You are White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven. The other assassins seem familiar, though…
 
Features: 
 
 • You play as Neon White, an assassin plucked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a shot at redemption.
 • Collect “Soul Cards” to attack your foes or discard them to use unique movement abilities.
 • Compete for the best times by cleverly combining cards to discover massive shortcuts.
• Uncover Heaven’s mysteries by getting to know the other assassins… did you know them in a past life?

Neon White es un frenético juego de acción en primera persona sobre el exterminio de los demonios en el cielo. Encarnarás a White, un asesino del infierno que deberá competir con otros asesinos de demonios por la oportunidad de vivir para siempre en el cielo. Sin embargo, los otros asesinos te resultan familiares... ¿los conociste en una vida pasada?

- Encarnarás a Neon White, un asesino sacado del infierno que deberá competir con otros asesinos de demonios por una oportunidad de redención.
- Colecciona “cartas de alma” para atacar a tus enemigos o descártalas para usar habilidades de movimiento únicas.
- Compite por lograr el mejor tiempo combinando cartas de forma inteligente para descubrir grandes atajos.
- Descubre los misterios del cielo mientras conoces a los demás asesinos... ¿Los conociste en una vida pasada?

Neon White est un jeu d'action rapide en vue subjective dans lequel tu dois éliminer des démons au paradis. Tu es White, un assassin sélectionné en enfer qui doit affronter d'autres tueurs de démons pour espérer pouvoir rester vivre au paradis. Mais les autres assassins te semblent familiers... les as-tu rencontrés dans une autre vie ?

- Tu incarnes Neon White, un assassin sauvé de l'enfer qui doit affronter d'autres tueurs de démons pour espérer la rédemption.
- Collecte des « cartes d'Âme » pour attaquer tes ennemis ou défausse-les pour utiliser des coups uniques.
- Bats-toi pour les records en réussissant les bonnes combinaisons de cartes pour découvrir d'énormes raccourcis.
- Révèle les mystères du paradis en apprenant à connaître les autres assassins… les as-tu rencontrés dans une autre vie ?

Neon White ist ein blitzschnelles Actionspiel aus der Ich-Perspektive, in dem es um die Vernichtung von Dämonen im Himmel geht. Du bist White, ein Attentäter, der aus der Hölle auserwählt wurde, um mit anderen Dämonenkillern um eine Chance zu konkurrieren, dauerhaft im Himmel zu leben. Die anderen Attentäter kommen dir allerdings bekannt vor ... hast du sie in einem früheren Leben gekannt?

- Du spielst Neon White, einen Attentäter, der aus der Hölle geholt wurde, um mit anderen Dämonenkillern um eine Chance auf Erlösung zu kämpfen.
- Sammle „Seelenkarten“, um deine Feinde anzugreifen, oder lege sie ab, um einzigartige Bewegungsfähigkeiten zu nutzen.
- Kämpfe um Bestzeiten, indem du die Karten geschickt kombinierst und so gewaltige Abkürzungen entdeckst.
- Entdecke die Geheimnisse des Himmels, indem du die anderen Attentäter kennenlernst ... kanntest du sie in einem früheren Leben?

Neon White é um jogo de ação na primeira pessoa incrivelmente rápido sobre eliminar demónios no Céu. És White, um assassino criteriosamente escolhido do Inferno para competir com outros assassinos de demónios numa luta pela possibilidade de viver para sempre no Céu. Mas os outros assassinos parecem familiares... terás conhecido algum numa vida passada?

- Jogas como Neon White, um assassino retirado do Inferno para competir com outros assassinos de demónios numa luta pela redenção.
- Recolhe "Cartas de Alma" para atacares os teus inimigos, ou sacrifica-as para usares habilidades únicas.
- Compete pelos melhores tempos com combinações inteligentes de cartas para descobrires atalhos surpreendentes.
- Desvenda os mistérios do Céu ao conhecer melhor os outros assassinos... terás conhecido algum numa vida passada?

Neon White è un action platform a ritmo mozzafiato in prima persona nel quale annienterai i demoni del paradiso. Gioca nei panni di White, un assassino scelto dall'inferno per contendersi con altri cacciatori di demoni la possibilità di vivere per sempre in paradiso. Gli altri assassini, però, hanno un che di familiare... vi siete già incontrati in una vita passata?

- Gioca nei panni di Neon White, un assassino pescato dall'inferno per contendersi la rendenzione con altri cacciatori di demoni.
- Colleziona le "carte dell'anima" con cui attaccare i tuoi nemici o scartale in favore di abilità di movimento uniche.
- Punta al tempo migliore combinando ingegnosamente le carte per scoprire velocissime scorciatoie.
- Scopri i segreti del paradiso approfondendo la conoscenza degli altri assassini… li hai già incontrati in una vita passata?

You are Neon White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven - Only the fastest slayer can stay.

title: Child of Light
description:
The duke’s daughter Aurora is dead . . . and yet, she lives. Join Aurora across the mysterious kingdom of Lemuria on her quest to return home. Helped by Igniculus the firefly, Finn the Capilli and many more, she must defeat the Queen of the Night who has stolen the sun, the moon and the stars.

The universe: Save the mysterious kingdom of Lemuria from the Queen of the Night, who has stolen the sun, the moon and the stars. 

Child of Light is a playable poem complemented with a story carefully crafted in verse and rhyme. Step into a living painting, the breathtaking scenery of Lemuria is an invitation to explore a long lost world.

Created by Ubisoft Montréal using the UbiArt Framework, Child of Light is an RPG inspired by fairy tales. 

Across your journey through Lemuria you will encounter many eccentric creatures, from spirits of the forest to talking mice to wicked witches and evil sea serpents. Discover a vast land with iconic locations and exciting dungeons that will evolve as Aurora regains the stolen lights.

localized_description.text:
The duke’s daughter Aurora is dead . . . and yet, she lives. Join Aurora across the mysterious kingdom of Lemuria on her quest to return home. Helped by Igniculus the firefly, Finn the Capilli and many more, she must defeat the Queen of the Night who has stolen the sun, the moon and the stars.

The universe: Save the mysterious kingdom of Lemuria from the Queen of the Night, who has stolen the sun, the moon and the stars. 

Child of Light is a playable poem complemented with a story carefully crafted in verse and rhyme. Step into a living painting, the breathtaking scenery of Lemuria is an invitation to explore a long lost world.

Created by Ubisoft Montréal using the UbiArt Framework, Child of Light is an RPG inspired by fairy tales. 

Across your journey through Lemuria you will encounter many eccentric creatures, from spirits of the forest to talking mice to wicked witches and evil sea serpents. Discover a vast land with iconic locations and exciting dungeons that will evolve as Aurora regains the stolen lights.

El reino de Lemuria está desesperado

La Reina negra ha robado el sol, la luna y las estrellas. Asume el papel de Aurora, una joven princesa de corazón puro a la que han convocado al reino de Lemuria. Embárcate en una misión para recuperar las tres fuentes de luz, derrotar a la Reina negra y restablecer el reino de Lemuria. Características principales 
 
¡Toda una aventura!

Creado por el prodigioso equipo de Ubisoft Montréal con UbiArt Framework, Child of Light es un RPG inspirado en los cuentos de hadas. 

Prepárate para un viaje extraordinario por el extenso mundo de Lemuria, explora sus míticos escenarios e interactúa con sus habitantes mientras descubres nuevos lugares y sus secretos.
 
El impresionante mundo de Lemuria

Durante tu experiencia en Lemuria, te encontrarás con hadas, gnomos, lobos salvajes y dragones oscuros que no olvidarás jamás.
 
Enfréntate a monstruos y a criaturas míticas malvadas  

Aurora tiene el poder de luchar contra criaturas de la oscuridad y recuperar las Luces robadas. Combate junto a Igniculus con sistemas de batalla por turnos.

Tu aliada, la luciérnaga, puede ser controlada por otro jugador para que puedas vivir esta aventura con tus amigos.

Le royaume de Lemuria court un grand péril

La Reine Noire a volé le soleil, la lune et les étoiles, plongeant le royaume dans les ténèbres. Incarnez Aurora, une jeune princesse au cœur pur dont l’âme vient de rejoindre le royaume de Lemuria. Préparez-vous à vivre une quête palpitante à la recherche des trois sources de lumière volées. Tous les espoirs des habitants de Lemuria reposent sur vous pour vaincre la Reine Noire et pour rendre au royaume sa grandeur passée... 
 
Une aventure passionnante et poétique vous attend  

Créé par la talentueuse équipe d’Ubisoft Montréal avec l’UbiArt Framework, Child of Light est un RPG inspiré de l’univers des contes de fées.

Partez pour un voyage extraordinaire à travers le vaste monde de Lemuria, explorez ses environnements féériques et interagissez avec ses habitants pour découvrir les innombrables secrets du royaume.
 
Découvrez toute la richesse de l’univers de Lemuria. 
 
Au cours de votre périple dans Lemuria, vous ferez mille et une rencontres inoubliables, des plus amicales (fées et lutins vous guideront dans votre aventure) aux plus hostiles (loups hargneux, gigantesques dragons sombres, et bien d’autres). 
 
Affrontez une multitude de monstres et créatures légendaires. 
 
Aurora a le pouvoir de combattre les créatures des ténèbres et de restaurer les Lumières Dérobées. Affrontez vos ennemis grâce  à un système de combat au tour par tour dynamique (Active Time Battle System).
 
Pour vous aider dans les combats, l’Igniculus, une  petite luciole, vous accompagnera. Elle pourra être contrôlée par un autre joueur, vous permettant de partager à deux  cette aventure unique, mémorable et poétique.

Im Königreich Lemuria herrscht Verzweiflung  
 
Die Schwarze Königin hat Sonne, Mond und Sterne gestohlen. Du spielst Aurora, eine junge Prinzessin mit reinem Herzen, deren Seele mit dem Königreich Lemuria verbunden ist. Begib dich auf die Suche nach den drei Quellen des Lichts, besiege die Schwarze Königin und stelle das Königreich Lemuria wieder her.
  
Ein Abenteuer erwartet dich! 
 
Child auf Light ist ein märchenhaftes Rollenspiel, das vom talentierten Ubisoft-Montréal-Team mithilfe von UbiArt Framework erschaffen wurde. Begib dich auf eine ungewöhnliche Reise durch die ausgedehnte Welt von Lemuria und erkunde mythische Landschaften oder interagiere mit ihren Einwohnern, während du neue Orte und ihre Geheimnisse entdeckst. 
  
Die lebendige Welt von Lemuria 
 
Im Verlauf deiner Reise durch Lemuria machst du denkwürdige Bekanntschaften, von freundlichen Feen und Gnomen bis zu wilden Wölfen und dunklen Drachen. 
  
Kämpfe gegen Monster und böse mythische Kreaturen    
 
Aurora hat die Macht, Kreaturen der Dunkelheit zu bekämpfen und die gestohlenen Lichtquellen wiederzubeschaffen. Kämpfe an der Seite des Ignuculus in einem Active Time Battle-System.

Dein Glühwürmchen-Freund kann von einem anderen Spieler gesteuert werden, sodass du dieses Abenteuer nicht allein bestehen musst.

Il regno di Lemuria è in pericolo

La Regina Nera ha rubato il Sole, la Luna e le Stelle. Impersona Aurora, una giovane principessa dal cuore puro la cui anima ha raggiunto il magico regno di Lemuria. La tua missione sarà recuperare le tre sorgenti di luce, sconfiggere la Regina Nera e salvare il regno e i suoi abitanti.
  
Un'incredibile avventura ti attende!

Creato dal talentuoso team di Ubisoft Montréal con l'ausilio del motore grafico UbiArt Framework, Child of Light è un GdR ispirato alle fiabe. 

Affronta uno straordinario viaggio nel vasto mondo di Lemuria, esplora i suoi paesaggi incantati e interagisci con i suoi abitanti in luoghi straordinari e pieni di segreti. 
 
Il palpitante mondo di Lemuria (ambientazione) 
 
Nel corso del tuo cammino per Lemuria farai incontri indimenticabili: amichevoli fatine e gnomi, ma anche pericolosi lupi e draghi oscuri. 
 
Affronta mostri e crudeli creature fantastiche (dinamica di gioco)  
 
Aurora ha il potere di combattere le creature del buio e ripristinare le Luci Rubate. Combatti a fianco di Igniculus con il sistema a turni Active time battle. 
 
La lucciola, tua alleata, può essere controllata da un altro giocatore, permettendoti così di condividere l'avventura con un amico.

title: The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth
description: The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth is a top down, procedurally-generated roguelike game, remade based on the original game The Binding of Isaac. You play as Isaac, a little boy who is chased to the basement by his mother who intends to kill Isaac for her savior. You explore different levels, collect items and try to defeat your mother.. and whatever other evil awaits you. If you die, you restart with none of your items you collected, and you must explore the basement and beyond again.

title: Brotato
description:
A spaceship from Potato World crashes onto an alien planet. The sole survivor: Brotato, the only potato capable of handling 6 weapons at the same time. Waiting to be rescued by his mates, Brotato must survive in this hostile environment. 
  
   
  Features    Auto-firing weapons by default with a manual aiming option 
    Fast runs (under 30 minutes) 
    Dozens of characters available to customize your runs (one-handed, crazy, lucky, mage and many more)  
    Hundreds of items and weapons to choose from (flamethrowers, SMGs, rocket launchers or sticks and stones)
    Local Co-Op for up to 4 players
   
    Survive waves lasting 20 to 90 seconds each and kill off as many aliens as you can during that time 
    Collect materials to gain experience and get items from the shop between waves of enemies 
    Accessibility options: tweak the health, damage and speed of enemies so the difficulty is right for you

localized_description.text:
A spaceship from Potato World crashes onto an alien planet. The sole survivor: Brotato, the only potato capable of handling 6 weapons at the same time. Waiting to be rescued by his mates, Brotato must survive in this hostile environment. 
  
   
  Features    Auto-firing weapons by default with a manual aiming option 
    Fast runs (under 30 minutes) 
    Dozens of characters available to customize your runs (one-handed, crazy, lucky, mage and many more)  
    Hundreds of items and weapons to choose from (flamethrowers, SMGs, rocket launchers or sticks and stones)
    Local Co-Op for up to 4 players
   
    Survive waves lasting 20 to 90 seconds each and kill off as many aliens as you can during that time 
    Collect materials to gain experience and get items from the shop between waves of enemies 
    Accessibility options: tweak the health, damage and speed of enemies so the difficulty is right for you

Una nave procedente de Tubércula se estrella en un planeta alienígena. Solo Brotato, la única patata capaz de manejar 6 armas al mismo tiempo, sobrevive a dicho accidente. A la espera de que sus compañeros lo auxilien, habrá de resistir en un entorno atroz. 
  
   
  Características    Autodisparo por defecto, aunque existe la opción de apuntar manualmente.
    Partidas rápidas (de menos de 30 minutos)
    Varios personajes disponibles con los que personalizar tus partidas (con una mano, enloquecido, afortunado, mago y muchos más) 
    Cientos de objetos y armas a tu elección (lanzallamas, subfusiles y lanzacohetes o incluso palos y piedras)
    Cooperativa local para hasta 4 jugadores
    Sobrevive a oleadas que duran de 20 a 90 segundos y elimina a cuantos más alienígenas puedas en dicho tiempo
    Reúne materiales para ganar experiencia y conseguir objetos en la tienda entre oleada y oleada
 *Opciones de accesibilidad: Configura la salud, el daño y la velocidad de los enemigos para dar con la dificultad que mejor te venga

Un vaisseau spatial du monde des patates s'écrase sur une planète alien. Le seul survivant : Brotato, la seule patate capable de manier 6 armes en même temps. En attente de se faire sauver par ses camarades, Brotato doit survivre dans cet environnement hostile. 
  
   
  Fonctionnalités    Les armes tirent automatiquement par défaut avec l'option de viser manuellement
    Parties rapides (moins de 30 minutes)
    Des dizaines de personnages disponibles pour personnaliser vos parties (manchot, fou, chanceux, mage et bien d'autres)
    Des centaines d'objets et d'armes parmi lesquels choisir (lance-flammes, SMG, lance-roquettes ou bâtons et cailloux)
    Coopération locale jusqu'à 4 joueurs
    Survivez à des vagues d'une durée de 20 à 90 secondes chacune et tuez autant d'extraterrestres que possible pendant cette période
    Collectez des matériaux pour acquérir de l'expérience et obtenez des objets de la boutique entre les vagues d'ennemis
    Options d'accessibilité : ajustez la santé, les dégâts et la vitesse des ennemis pour que la difficulté vous convienne

Ein Raumschiff von der Kartoffelwelt stürzt auf einem Alien-Planeten ab. Der einzige Überlebende: Brotato, die einzige Kartoffel, die mit 6 Waffen gleichzeitig umgehen kann. Während er auf die Rettung durch seine Freunde wartet, muss Brotato in dieser feindseligen Umgebung überleben.
  
   
  Features    Standardmäßig automatisch feuernde Waffen mit der Möglichkeit, manuell zu zielen
    Schnelle Durchläufe (unter 30 Minuten)
    Dutzende von Charakteren, mit denen du deine Durchläufe individuell anpassen kannst (Einarmiger, Irrer, Glückspilz, Magier und viele mehr) 
    Hunderte von Items und Waffen (Flammenwerfer, MPs und Raketenwerfer oder Stöcke und Steine)
    Lokaler Koop-Modus für bis zu 4 Spieler
    Überlebe Gegnerwellen, die 20 bis 90 Sekunden andauern, und töte währenddessen möglichst viele Aliens
    Sammle Materialien, um Erfahrung zu erhalten, und hole dir zwischen den Gegnerwellen verschiedene Items im Laden
    Barrierefreiheitsoptionen: Passe die Leben, den Schaden und das Tempo von Gegnern an, damit die Schwierigkeit genau deinen Anforderungen entspricht

Una nave spaziale proveniente da Patamondo si schianta su un pianeta alieno. C'è un solo superstite: Brotato, l'unica patata in grado di impugnare 6 armi contemporaneamente! Mentre aspetta di essere soccorso, Brotato deve sopravvivere in questo mondo ostile. 
  
   
  Caratteristiche    Le armi sparano automaticamente per impostazione predefinita, ma è possibile passare alla mira manuale.
    Partite rapide (meno di 30 minuti).
    Decine di personaggi con cui personalizzare le partite (Tuttofare, Svitato, Fortunello, Mago e molti altri).
    Centinaia di armi e oggetti tra cui scegliere (da lanciafiamme e mitragliatrici a sassi e fionde).
    Cooperativa locale fino a 4 giocatori
    Sopravvivi a ondate di 20-90 secondi e uccidi tutti gli alieni che puoi.
    Raccogli materiali per salire di livello e acquistare oggetti tra un'ondata e l'altra.
    Opzioni di accessibilità: modifica salute, danni e velocità dei nemici per cambiare la difficoltà del gioco.

 来自土豆世界的宇宙飞船坠毁在异形星球上。土豆兄弟Brotato是唯一的幸存者，也是唯一一颗能够同时扛起6把武器的土豆哥。在Brotato等待伙伴们来拯救他之前，得想办法在这个危机四伏的鬼地方活下去才行！
 
   游戏特色   武器预设为自动射击，但你也可以选择手动瞄准的设置！
   节奏快速（每场不满30分钟）！
   有数十个角色供你选择，相信你能整出满意的打法（单手打、疯狂攻击、超幸运类型、法师风格等多种类别）！
   几百种道具跟武器供你挑选（火焰发射器、冲锋枪、火箭筒、法杖或石头）！
   每次的敌袭浪潮会持续20～90秒，想办法在这段期间内多消灭一点敌人并生存下来！
   拾取经验进行升级，并在每波敌袭的间隔去商店弄点道具吧！
   自定义难度选项：你可以在设置里调整敌人的生命值、伤害量和速度，找出最适合你的难度开始你的生存之旅！

精選 DLC  
 
  check out our friends game  
 
  關於此遊戲 來自馬鈴薯世界的宇宙飛船墜毀在異形星球上。僅有Brotato一個人大難不死，他是唯一一顆能夠同時扛起6把武器的馬鈴薯。在Brotato等待夥伴們來拯救他之前，得想辦法在這個四處逢敵的鬼地方活下去才行。
 
   遊戲特色   武器預設為自動開火的同時需要靠手動瞄準
   節奏快速（每場不滿30分鐘）
   有一拖拉庫的角色讓你整出滿意的打法（單手打、瘋狂攻擊、超幸運類型、法師風格等多種類別）
   幾百種道具跟武器供你挑選（火焰發射器、衝鋒槍、火箭筒、法杖或石頭）
   每次的敵襲浪潮會持續20～90秒，想辦法在這段期間內多殺一點敵人並生存下來
   搜集素材獲得經驗值，並在每波敵襲的間隔去商店弄點道具吧
   輔助功能選項：調整敵人的生命值、傷害量和速度，找出最適合你的難易度

  ゲームについて ポテト ワールドの宇宙船が、エイリアンの惑星に衝突しました。唯一の生存者Brotatoは、一度に6つの武器を扱えるポテト。周りに敵しかいない環境で、仲間に救出されるのを待ちながら、生き残らなければなりません。
 
  
 
   内容      手動照準オプションがあるデフォルトの自動発射武器 
    高速疾走（30分未満） 
    疾走をカスタマイズできる数十のキャラクター（片手武器、クレイジー、ラッキー、メイジなど） 
    数百のアイテムと武器から選択可能（火炎放射器、SMG、ロケットランチャー、棒と石など） 
    それぞれ20～90秒続く敵の波を乗り越え、その間にできるだけ多くのエイリアンを倒します 
    敵の波の合間で材料を集めて経験を積み、ショップからアイテムを入手します 
    アクセシビリティオプション：敵のヘルス、ダメージ、速度をお好み通りに微調整

title: ANTONBLAST
description:
JOIN OUR DISCORD!  
 
  About the Game  
 
  
 
  ANTONBLAST  is a fast-paced explosive action platformer that's all about  destruction . Play as the enraged Dynamite Anton (or his cranked-out coworker Annie) and use your Mighty F’n Hammer to demolish bizarre worlds, tussle with screen-filling bosses, and steal your Spirits back from Satan!
 
 That's right: Satan himself has stolen Anton's prized Spirit collection, and he'll stop at nothing to get it back. Thankfully, the local disgraced casino owner, Brulo, has his own beef with Satan, and he's willing to put aside his differences with Anton to make that devil pay.
 
 Your mission in every level is simple:  SET  Brulo's Detonators,  FIND  Anton's Spirit, and  ESCAPE  before Happy Hour ends!
 
   BLAST through a unique powertrip of a platformer!
   INDULGE in an urban graffiti-inspired art style!
   DEMOLISH massive destructible environments!
   BATTLE brutal, earthshaking bosses!
   EXPERIMENT with a totally dynamic playstyle; rush through for the best time or explore at your own pace!   Find out where it all began!

JOIN OUR DISCORD!  
 
  À propos du jeu  
 
  ANTONBLAST  est un jeu d'action et de plateforme explosif au rythme effréné, axé sur la destruction. Incarnez le furieux Dynamite Anton (ou sa collègue Annie) et utilisez votre Puissant Marteau pour démolir des mondes bizarres, affronter des boss qui remplissent l'écran et reprendre vos esprits à Satan !
 
 C'est vrai : Satan en personne a volé la précieuse collection d'esprits d'Anton, et il ne reculera devant rien pour la récupérer. Heureusement, Brulo, le propriétaire du casino local en disgrâce, a ses propres problèmes avec Satan et il est prêt à mettre de côté ses différends avec Anton pour faire payer le diable.
 
 Votre mission dans chaque niveau est simple : Déclenchez les détonateurs de Brulo, trouvez l'esprit d'Anton et échappez-vous avant la fin de l'Happy Hour !
 
 FOULE à travers un jeu de plateforme unique en son genre !
 PLONGEZ dans un style artistique inspiré des graffitis urbains !
 DÉMOLISSEZ les environnements destructibles !
 AFFRONTREZ des boss brutaux qui font trembler la terre !
 EXPERIMENTEZ un style de jeu totalement dynamique : foncez pour obtenir le meilleur temps ou explorez à votre rythme !

   EXPERIMENT with a totally dynamic playstyle; rush through for the best time or explore at your own pace!   Find out where it all began!

JOIN OUR DISCORD!  
 
  Informazioni sul gioco  
 
  
 
  ANTONBLAST  is a fast-paced explosive action platformer that's all about  destruction . Play as the enraged Dynamite Anton (or his cranked-out coworker Annie) and use your Mighty F’n Hammer to demolish bizarre worlds, tussle with screen-filling bosses, and steal your Spirits back from Satan!
 
 That's right: Satan himself has stolen Anton's prized Spirit collection, and he'll stop at nothing to get it back. Thankfully, the local disgraced casino owner, Brulo, has his own beef with Satan, and he's willing to put aside his differences with Anton to make that devil pay.
 
 Your mission in every level is simple:  SET  Brulo's Detonators,  FIND  Anton's Spirit, and  ESCAPE  before Happy Hour ends!

JOIN OUR DISCORD!  
 
  ゲームについて  
  アントンブラースト は破壊をテーマにしたハイスピード横スクロールアクションです。怒り狂ったダイナマイト・アントン（もしくは同僚の荒々しいアニー）を操作し、マイティクソハンマーで奇妙な世界を破壊し、強大なボスと戦い、サタンからスピリッツを奪い返しましょう！
 
 そうです： サタンがアントンの大事なスピリッツを奪いました。幸運なことに、ブルーロという地元の評判の悪いカジノオーナーはサタンに怨みを抱いており、アイツに制裁を与えるならアントンにしぶしぶ協力します。
 
 各レベルのミッションはシンプルです： ブルーロの起爆装置を セット して、アントンのスピリッツを見 つけて 、ハッピーアワーが終わる前に 脱出 しましょう！
 
   爽快感まんさいなハイスピードアクションで盛 り上がろう！ 
   都会のストリートアートにインスパイアされたグラフィックに 没頭 しよう！
   巨大なエリアを思う存分 破壊 しよう！
   大地を揺るがす強大なボスと 壮絶なバトル を繰り広げよう！
    ダイナミック なゲームプレイを味わおう！ベストタイムを競っても、じっくり探索もできる！  
  すべての始まりを発見しましょう！

title: Apex Legends
description:
APEX LEGENDS: FROM THE RIFT   
 
  About the Game Conquer with character in Apex Legends, a free-to-play* Hero shooter where legendary characters with powerful abilities team up to battle for fame & fortune on the fringes of the Frontier.
 
 Master an ever-growing roster of diverse Legends, deep-tactical squad play, and bold, new innovations that go beyond the Battle Royale experience — all within a rugged world where anything goes. Welcome to the next evolution of Hero Shooter.
 
  KEY FEATURES 
  
 
 This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency that can be used to acquire virtual in-game items, including a random selection of virtual in-game items.
 
 Note that any unused Apex Coins will expire 180 days after the first date in which they are acquired or purchased. The oldest Apex Coins that are subject to expiration in your balance will always be used first when using them to make in-game purchases.
 
 Apex Packs purchase is not available in Belgium.

localized_title.text: エーペックスレジェンズ

localized_description.text:
《Apex Legends：源自裂隙》   
 
  关于游戏 在《Apex Legends》这款免费*英雄射击游戏中脱颖而出，掌控角色，征服群雄，集结技艺超群的强大传奇角色，组队在边境之地为名利而战。
 
 掌控丰富的传奇角色群、深度战术小队玩法以及大胆革新的元素，获得前所未有的新一代大逃杀竞技射击游戏体验——在这崎岖的世界，一切皆有可能。欢迎来到新一代英雄射击游戏。
 
  主要特色： 
  
 
 本游戏含非必要的虚拟货币购买，用于获得游戏内虚拟物品，其中包括一些随机的游戏内虚拟物品。

《Apex 英雄》：源自裂縫   
 
  關於此遊戲 在《Apex 英雄》中和你的角色一起爭霸，這是一款免費遊玩*的英雄射擊遊戲，其中擁有強大技能的傳說級角色將在戰場上一起組隊合作來在邊境上取得名聲與財富。
 
 在這個超越大逃殺體驗的殘破而紛亂的世界中，掌握不斷增加的多種英雄、精深的戰術小隊遊戲和大膽的創新。歡迎來到新一代的英雄射擊遊戲。
 
  重點特色： 
  
 
 此遊戲包含可選的遊戲內虛擬點數購買，可用於獲取遊戲內虛擬物品，包括隨機選擇的虛擬遊戲內物品。

APEX LEGENDS: FROM THE RIFT   
 
  About the Game Conquer with character in Apex Legends, a free-to-play* Hero shooter where legendary characters with powerful abilities team up to battle for fame & fortune on the fringes of the Frontier.
 
 Master an ever-growing roster of diverse Legends, deep-tactical squad play, and bold, new innovations that go beyond the Battle Royale experience — all within a rugged world where anything goes. Welcome to the next evolution of Hero Shooter.
 
  KEY FEATURES 
  
 
 This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency that can be used to acquire virtual in-game items, including a random selection of virtual in-game items.
 
 Note that any unused Apex Coins will expire 180 days after the first date in which they are acquired or purchased. The oldest Apex Coins that are subject to expiration in your balance will always be used first when using them to make in-game purchases.
 
 Apex Packs purchase is not available in Belgium.

APEX LEGENDS: DESDE LA BRECHA   
 
  Acerca del juego Domina con estilo en Apex Legends™, un juego gratuito* de acción en primera persona, donde personajes legendarios con poderosas habilidades forman equipos para luchar y lograr fortuna y gloria en los confines de la Frontera.
 
 Domina un elenco creciente y diverso de leyendas, el juego táctico basado en pelotones y las grandes innovaciones que superan la experiencia del Battle Royale (en un mundo duro en el que todo vale). Te damos la bienvenida a la nueva evolución de los juegos de acción en primera persona.
 
  CARACTERÍSTICAS PRINCIPALES 
  
 
 Este título incluye compras opcionales en el juego de moneda virtual que se puede utilizar para obtener artículos virtuales del juego, incluida una selección aleatoria de los mismos.

APEX LEGENDS : ABYSSES COSMIQUES   
 
  À propos du jeu Dominez vos adversaires dans Apex Legends, un jeu de tir gratuit* où des personnages légendaires aux capacités surpuissantes combattent ensemble aux confins de la Frontière pour la gloire et la fortune.
 
 Maîtrisez une équipe de Légendes en croissance constante, avec une grande profondeur tactique et une kyrielle d'innovations qui enrichissent votre expérience de Battle Royale au sein d'un monde sauvage où tout peut arriver. Bienvenue dans la nouvelle évolution des jeux de tir de héros.
 
  CARACTÉRISTIQUES 
  
 
 Ce jeu inclut des achats intégrés facultatifs de devise virtuelle pouvant servir à acquérir des éléments de jeu virtuels, dont une sélection aléatoire d’éléments de jeu virtuels.
 
 L’achat de packs Apex n’est pas disponible en Belgique.

APEX LEGENDS: AUS DEM PORTAL   
 
  Infos zum Spiel Erobere mit Stil in Apex Legends, einem Free-to-Play* Helden-Shooter, bei dem legendäre Charaktere mit mächtigen Fähigkeiten in Teams am Rand des Grenzlandes um Ruhm und Reichtum kämpfen.
 
 Meistere einen ständig wachsenden Kader verschiedener Legenden mit einem umfassenden, taktischen Squad-Spiel und mutigen Innovationen, die über das gewohnte Battle-Royale-Erlebnis hinausgehen – in einer rauen Welt, in der alles möglich ist. Willkommen bei der nächsten Evolutionsstufe des Helden-Shooters.
 
  ZENTRALE FEATURES 
  
 
 Dieses Spiel enthält optionale In-Game-Käufe virtueller Währungen, mit denen du virtuelle In-Game-Objekte erwerben kannst, einschließlich einer zufälligen Auswahl virtueller In-Game-Objekte.

APEX LEGENDS: FROM THE RIFT   
 
  Acerca do jogo Domina em grande no Apex Legends, um jogo de tiros com Heróis grátis* onde personagens lendárias com habilidades poderosas, formam equipas para lutar por fama e fortuna nos confins da Frontier.
 
 Domina um elenco crescente de Lendas diversas, joga em equipa com tática e inovações arrojadas que aumentam a fasquia da experiência Battle Royale —tudo dentro de um mundo agreste onde vale tudo. Esta é a próxima evolução dos jogos de tiros com heróis.
 
  CARACTERÍSTICAS PRINCIPAIS 
  
 
 O jogo inclui compras opcionais no jogo de moeda virtual, que podes usar para adquirir itens virtuais no jogo, incluindo uma seleção aleatória de itens de jogo virtuais.

エーペックスレジェンズ: フロム・ザ・リフト   
 
  ゲームについて 熾烈な侵略戦が展開する「エーペックスレジェンズ」は、強力なアビリティを操る伝説の戦士たちが結集し、フロンティアの辺境で富と名声を懸けて戦う、プレイ無料*のバトルロイヤルシューティング。
 
 次々と登場する個性豊かなレジェンドたち、奥深い戦術性の部隊プレイ、バトルロイヤルを超えた大胆な進化。何でもありの荒涼とした世界で、これらすべてを極めろ。ヒーローシューターの進化形にようこそ。
 
  主な特徴 
  
 
 本ゲームには、ゲーム内アイテム（ランダムで排出、または選択されるアイテムを含む）の購入に使用するゲーム内通貨を購入する機能があります。
 
 未使用のApexコインは、獲得または購入から180日後に使用不可となりますのでご注意ください。ゲーム内購入の際は、所持している中で最も使用期限に近い（入手日が最も古い）Apexコインから常に先に消費されます。

APEX LEGENDS: FROM THE RIFT   
 
  About the Game Conquer with character in Apex Legends, a free-to-play* Hero shooter where legendary characters with powerful abilities team up to battle for fame & fortune on the fringes of the Frontier.
 
 Master an ever-growing roster of diverse Legends, deep-tactical squad play, and bold, new innovations that go beyond the Battle Royale experience — all within a rugged world where anything goes. Welcome to the next evolution of Hero Shooter.
 
  KEY FEATURES 
  
 
 This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency that can be used to acquire virtual in-game items, including a random selection of virtual in-game items.
 
 Note that any unused Apex Coins will expire 180 days after the first date in which they are acquired or purchased. The oldest Apex Coins that are subject to expiration in your balance will always be used first when using them to make in-game purchases.
 
 Apex Packs purchase is not available in Belgium.

APEX LEGENDS: FROM THE RIFT   
 
  Om spillet Vind med stil i Apex Legends – et helteskydespil, som kan spilles gratis* – hvori legendariske figurer med magtfulde evner kæmper om rigdom og berømmelse på den yderste grænse.
 
 Behersk en konstant voksende liste over forskellige legender med komplekst taktisk holdspil og spændende nye innovationer i denne nyeste udvikling af Battle Royale – alt sammen i en barsk verden, hvor alle kneb gælder. Velkommen til den næste udvikling af helteskydespil.
 
  VIGTIGE FUNKTIONER: 
  
 
 Dette spil omfatter valgfrie køb i spillet af virtuel valuta, der kan bruges til at erhverve virtuelle genstande i spillet, herunder et tilfældigt udvalg af virtuelle genstande i spillet.

APEX LEGENDS: DALLO SQUARCIO   
 
  Informazioni sul gioco Domina la competizione in Apex Legends, uno sparatutto gratuito* in stile battle royale in cui personaggi leggendari dotati di potenti abilità si sfidano per fama e ricchezza ai margini della Frontiera.
 
 Padroneggia un elenco in continua espansione di leggende diverse, un gioco di squadra intenso e tattico e audaci innovazioni che rivoluzionano l'esperienza del genere battle royale, il tutto all'interno di un mondo selvaggio dove tutto è permesso. La nuova evoluzione degli sparatutto ti dà il benvenuto.
 
  CARATTERISTICHE PRINCIPALI 
  
 
 Questo gioco include la possibilità di acquistare, all’interno del gioco, tramite denaro reale una valuta virtuale da utilizzare per acquistare oggetti di gioco virtuali, che potrebbero essere attribuiti anche tramite una selezione casuale.

title: Vampire Survivors
description:
Mow thousands of night creatures and survive until dawn! Vampire Survivors is a gothic horror casual game with rogue-lite elements, where your choices can allow you to quickly snowball against the hundreds of monsters that get thrown at you.

Vampire Survivors is nominally set in rural Italy in 2021. Hordes of monsters summoned by the evil Bisconte Draculó (a villain inspired by Count Dracula) ravage the land, prompting the Belpaese family and other heroic survivors to take it upon themselves to hunt down and defeat Draculó. This quest takes them through monster-infested locales such as a cursed forest, a haunted library, an abandoned dairy plant, an ominous tower, and an otherworldly chapel, culminating in a battle against an Eldritch otherworldly being referred to as "The Directer". Despite the game's title, the characters do not fight any vampires in the story.

title: World of Warships
description:
Download and play World of Warships absolutely FREE — you can progress through the game’s countless ship trees simply by playing the game and accumulating experience.
  
        Naval warfare has never looked this good! Engage in thrilling battles between massive fleets across a multitude of gigantic maps where every maneuver, salvo, or push can mean the difference between utmost triumph and total defeat.
  
        From Bismarck and Yamato to Iowa and Hood… The most famous and historic warships of WWI and WWII have been recreated in breathtaking detail, making World of Warships the most extensive virtual naval museum on the planet!
  
        Every playstyle has its place! Take command of devastating but slow battleships, versatile but vulnerable cruisers, stealthy but lightly-armed destroyers, or quick-striking but fragile aircraft carriers — and everything in between!
  
        Choose your favorite branch among 12 in-game nations and battle your way up a comprehensive ship tier system following a natural historical progression.
  
        Install modifications on your ship to fit your playstyle, train your commanders to unlock special skills, and augment your fleet with camouflages, signal flags, and more.
  
        If the life of a lone wolf is not for you, invite your friends to a Division and put your co-operative skills to the test! If you're looking for a real challenge, join a Clan, climb to the top of the Clan league, and strive to be the best on your server!

localized_description.text:
下载并游玩《战舰世界》是完全免费的——您只需通过游玩和积累经验，即可推进游戏中数不胜数的战舰科技树。
 
       
 从未见过画面如此精良的海战！在众多巨大的地图上，参与大型舰队之间的惊险战斗，每一次机动、齐射或推进都可能决定结局是大获全胜，抑或全面败北。
 
       
 从俾斯麦号和大和号到依阿华号和胡德号……我们重建了一战和二战中最著名的历史战舰，并精心雕琢细节，将《战舰世界》打造成地球上最大的虚拟海军博物馆。
 
       
 每一种游戏风格都有一席之地！无论是具备毁灭性打击能力但航速缓慢的战列舰，还是功能全面但易受攻击的巡洋舰、或是隐蔽性强但装甲薄弱的驱逐舰、抑或具备快速打击能力但是脆弱的航空母舰——甚至是不同风格的结合！
 
       
 从12个不同的游戏内国家里选择您心仪的分支，按照自然的历史进程，在综合性的战舰级别系统中通过战斗提升级别。
 
       
 在战舰上安装适合您游戏风格的配件，训练您的指挥官并解锁特殊技能，通过涂装、信号旗等物品增强您的舰队。
 
       
 如果您不喜欢做孤胆英雄，那么不如邀请您的好友加入小队，在战斗中考验您的协作能力！如果您正在寻求真正的挑战，不如加入军团，在军团联盟中问鼎，在您的区服中称霸。

免費下載並遊玩《戰艦世界》— 您只需遊玩和累積經驗，即可在遊戲的多個科技樹中攀升。
 
       
 最精緻的海軍戰鬥！加入大型艦隊之間的激烈海戰，沉浸於多個巨大地圖，每個轉向、齊射或推進，都可能決定您會凱旋而歸或是一敗塗地。
 
       
 從 Bismarck、Yamato、Iowa 到 Hood… 這些最著名的兩次世界大戰史實戰艦，在遊戲中重新再造並呈現最令人讚歎的精美細節，造就《戰艦世界》成為世界上最大的虛擬海軍博物館！
 
       
 她們的玩法各異！您可指揮威力強大但緩慢的主力艦、多功能但易受傷的巡洋艦、隱蔽但輕裝甲的驅逐艦，或打擊迅速但脆弱的航空母艦，應有盡有！
 
       
 在 12 個遊戲內國家中選擇您最愛的分支，依照自然的史實進展，在全面的艦艇階級系統中攀升。
 
       
 修改艦艇以符合您的玩法風格、訓練指揮官以解鎖特殊技能、為艦隊添加迷彩、信號旗及其他自訂物品。
 
       
 如果孤狼的生活不適合您，您可邀請好友組成分艦隊，測試你們的合作技巧！若您想尋求真正的挑戰，那就加入公會，攀升至公會聯賽頂端，並努力成為您伺服器上的佼佼者！

Download and play World of Warships absolutely FREE — you can progress through the game’s countless ship trees simply by playing the game and accumulating experience.
  
        Naval warfare has never looked this good! Engage in thrilling battles between massive fleets across a multitude of gigantic maps where every maneuver, salvo, or push can mean the difference between utmost triumph and total defeat.
  
        From Bismarck and Yamato to Iowa and Hood… The most famous and historic warships of WWI and WWII have been recreated in breathtaking detail, making World of Warships the most extensive virtual naval museum on the planet!
  
        Every playstyle has its place! Take command of devastating but slow battleships, versatile but vulnerable cruisers, stealthy but lightly-armed destroyers, or quick-striking but fragile aircraft carriers — and everything in between!
  
        Choose your favorite branch among 12 in-game nations and battle your way up a comprehensive ship tier system following a natural historical progression.
  
        Install modifications on your ship to fit your playstyle, train your commanders to unlock special skills, and augment your fleet with camouflages, signal flags, and more.
  
        If the life of a lone wolf is not for you, invite your friends to a Division and put your co-operative skills to the test! If you're looking for a real challenge, join a Clan, climb to the top of the Clan league, and strive to be the best on your server!

Descarga World of Warships y juega totalmente GRATIS: puedes progresar por innumerables árboles navales jugando al juego y acumulando experiencia.
 
       
 ¡Las contiendas navales nunca fueron tan atractivas! Entra en emocionante batallas entre flotas enormes en multitud de vastos mapas donde cada maniobra, salva o embestida puede marcar la diferencia entre un triunfo rotundo y una derrota contundente.
 
       
 Desde el Bismarck y el Yamato hasta el Iowa y el Hood... Los buques militares más históricos y famosos de la IGM y la IIGM se han recreado con un impresionante nivel de detalle. ¡World of Warships es el museo naval virtual más amplio del planeta!
 
       
 ¡Cada estilo de juego tiene su sitio! Toma el mando de acorazados, destructivos pero lentos; cruceros, versátiles pero vulnerables; destructores, sigilosos pero con armamento ligero; o portaaviones, que golpean rápido pero son frágiles; ¡y todas las combinaciones intermedias entre ellos!
 
       
 Elige tu rama favorita entre las 12 naciones del juego y asciende por un amplio sistema de niveles de barcos que sigue un progreso histórico natural.
 
       
 Instala modificaciones en tu barco que se ajusten a tu estilo de juego, entrena a tus comandantes para desbloquear habilidades especiales y refuerza tu flota con camuflajes, banderas de señales y otros artículos.
 
       
 Si la vida de lobo solitario no es lo tuyo, ¡invita a tus amigos a una división y pon a prueba tus habilidades cooperativas! Y si buscas un desafío a lo grande, ¡únete a un clan, ascended a lo alto de la liga de clanes y luchad por ser los mejores de vuestro servidor!

Téléchargez et jouez à World of Warships complètement GRATUITEMENT : vous pouvez progresser dans les multiples arbres technologiques en jouant simplement au jeu et en accumulant de l'expérience.
 
       
 La guerre navale n'a jamais eu une telle allure ! Participez à des batailles palpitantes entre des flottes massives sur une multitude de cartes gigantesques où chaque manœuvre, chaque salve et chaque percée peuvent faire la différence entre un triomphe absolu et une défaite cuisante.
 
       
 Du Bismarck au Yamato, en passant par l'Iowa et le Hood... Les navires de guerre historiques les plus célèbres de la Première et de la Seconde Guerre mondiale ont été recréés avec de minutieux détails, faisant de World of Warships le plus grand musée naval virtuel au monde !
 
       
 Chaque style de jeu a sa place ! Prenez le commandement de cuirassés lents mais dévastateurs, de croiseurs polyvalents mais vulnérables, de destroyers furtifs mais légèrement armés, ou de porte-avions fragiles aux frappes rapides, et de tout le reste !
 
       
 Choisissez votre branche préférée parmi les 12 nations en jeu et progressez dans un système global de rangs de navires qui suit une progression historique naturelle.
 
       
 Installez des modifications sur votre navire pour l'adapter à votre style de jeu, entraînez vos commandants pour débloquer des compétences spéciales et agrémentez votre flotte de camouflages, pavillons et plus.
 
       
 Si vous n'êtes pas du genre loup solitaire, invitez vos amis dans une division et mettez vos compétences de coopération à l'épreuve ! Si vous êtes à la recherche d'un véritable défi, rejoignez un clan, atteignez le sommet de la ligue des clans et combattez pour devenir le meilleur sur votre serveur !

Ladet World of Warships herunter und spielt absolut KOSTENLOS – ihr könnt Fortschritte in zahllosen Schiffszweigen machen, indem ihr einfach das Spiel spielt und Erfahrung sammelt.
 
       
 Noch nie sah Seekriegsführung so gut aus! Stürzt euch in atemberaubende Schlachten zwischen gewaltigen Flotten auf einer Vielzahl von gigantischen Karten, wo jedes Manöver, jede Salve oder jeder Vorstoß über allergrößten Triumph und totaler Niederlage entscheiden können.
 
       
 Von der Bismarck und der Yamato bis zur Iowa und zur Hood – die atemberaubende Detailgenauigkeit der Nachbildungen der berühmtesten historischen Kriegsschiffe beider Weltkriege macht World of Warships zum umfassendsten virtuellen Marinemuseum unseres Planeten!
 
       
 Es gibt Schiffe für jeden Spielstil! Übernehmt das Kommando über zerstörerische aber langsame Schlachtschiffe, vielseitige aber verwundbare Kreuzer, verstohlene aber nur leicht gepanzerte Zerstörer oder schnell angreifende aber fragile Flugzeugträger – oder alles dazwischen!
 
       
 Wählt aus den 12 im Spiel verfügbaren Nationen euren Lieblingsschiffszweig aus und kämpft euch in einem umfangreichen Schiffsstufensystem nach oben, indem ihr einem natürlichen historischen Verlauf folgt.
 
       
 Installiert Modifikationen auf eurem Schiff, die zu eurem Spielstil passen, bildet eure Kapitäne aus, um besondere Fertigkeiten freizuschalten, und stattet eure Flotte mit Tarnungen, Signalflaggen und mehr aus.
 
       
 Wenn ihr kein einsamer Wolf sein wollt, ladet eure Freunde in eine Division ein und stellt eure Teamfähigkeit auf die Probe! Wenn ihr nach einer echten Herausforderung sucht, tretet einem Clan bei, steigt bis an die Spitze der Clanliga auf und setzt alles daran, auf eurem Server der Beste zu werden!

JOGUE GRÁTIS  Descarregue e jogue o World of Warships completamente GRÁTIS - pode progredir pelas incontáveis árvores de navios simplesmente jogando o jogo e acumulando experiência.  COMBATE NAVAL ÉPICO  A guerra naval nunca pareceu tão boa! Envolva-se em batalhas emocionantes entre frotas enormes numa infinidade de mapas gigantescos, onde cada manobra, salva ou empurrão pode significar a diferença entre o triunfo máximo e a derrota total.  MAIS DE 600 NAVIOS   Do Bismarck e Yamato ao Iowa e Hood… Os navios de guerra mais famosos e históricos da 1ª e 2ª Guerra Mundial foram recriados com detalhes de tirar o fôlego, tornando o World of Warships o mais extenso museu naval virtual do planeta!  4 CLASSES DIFERENTES  Cada estilo de jogo tem o seu lugar! Assuma o comando de lentos mas devastadores navios de guerra, versáteis mas vulneráveis cruzadores, furtivos mas levemente armados contratorpedeiros ou de ataque rápido mas frágeis porta-aviões - e todos os outros pelo meio!  RECOMPENSAR PROGRESSÃO  Escolha o seu ramo favorito entre 12 nações no jogo e lute para subir num sistema abrangente de níveis de navios, seguindo uma progressão histórica natural.  MELHORAR E PERSONALIZAR  Instale modificações no seu navio para se adequar ao seu estilo de jogo, treine os seus comandantes para desbloquear habilidades especiais e aumente a sua frota com camuflagens, bandeiras sinalizadoras e mais.  JOGUE SOZINHO OU COM AMIGOS  Se a vida de um lobo solitário não é para si, convide os seus amigos para uma Divisão e coloque as suas habilidades de cooperação à prova! Se está à procura de um verdadeiro desafio, junte-se a um Clã, chegue ao topo da liga de Clãs e esforce-se para ser o melhor no seu servidor!

『World of Warships』は、完全無料でダウンロードして楽しむことができます。そして単にゲームをプレイして EXP を貯めるだけで、無数の艦艇ブランチを進めていくことが可能です。
 
       
 かつてなく見事な海戦を楽しむことが可能です！様々な大型マップにおける大艦隊同士の緊張感あふれる交戦では、全ての機動、斉射、または攻勢が最高の勝利と完全な敗北を分け得ます。
 
       
 ビスマルクや大和からアイオワやフッドまで、一次大戦から二次大戦にかけての高名な史実艦艇が高精細に再現されており、『World of Warships』はこの惑星における最も大規模なバーチャル海軍博物館と言えるでしょう！
 
       
 あらゆるプレイスタイルが楽しめます！破壊的ながらも低速な戦艦や、万能ながらも打たれ弱い巡洋艦、高隠蔽ながらも軽装甲の駆逐艦、または素早い攻撃が可能ながらも脆弱な航空母艦、およびそれらの中間的な様々な艦艇の舵を取って戦いましょう！
 
       
 12 種類のゲーム内国家から好みのブランチを選び、自然な歴史の流れに従った統括的な艦艇 Tier システムに則って上位の艦艇を研究し入手しましょう。
 
       
 プレイスタイルに応じて艦艇に装備を搭載し、艦長を訓練して特別スキルをアンロックし、迷彩塗装や信号旗などで艦艇をカスタマイズしましょう。
 
       
 一匹狼として戦うこともできますし、友達を招待して分艦隊を組み、連携しながら戦うことも可能です！真の挑戦を求めるのであれば、クランに加入してクラン戦で上位を目指し、所属サーバーで最高の実力を示しましょう！

Naval warfare has never looked this good!  Download World of Warships for  FREE  and engage in thrilling battles between massive fleets across a multitude of gigantic maps. Every maneuver, salvo, and push can mean the difference between utmost triumph and total defeat!
       
  From the mighty Yamato to the elusive U-190, explore a near-bottomless sea of playstyles aboard historic battleships, destroyers, cruisers, submarines, and aircraft carriers—each faithfully recreated in 3D. 
       
  If the life of a lone wolf is not for you, invite your friends to a Division and put your co-operative skills to the test! If you're looking for a real challenge, join a Clan, climb to the top of the Clan league, and strive to be the best on your server!
       
  Plot a course across 12 national Tech Trees and fine-tune your personal approach to naval combat by installing modifications, unlocking skills for your Commanders, and augmenting your fleet’s appearance with camouflages and more cosmetics.

¡La acción naval nunca fue tan espectacular!  Descarga World of Warships  GRATIS  y participa en batallas fascinantes entre flotas colosales en multitud de mapas donde cada maniobra, salva o ataque puede marcar la diferencia entre un triunfo máximo y una derrota total.
       
  Desde el poderoso Yamato hasta el escurridizo U-190, explora un océano casi infinito de estilos de juego a bordo de acorazados, destructores, cruceros, submarinos y portaaviones históricos reproducidos con fidelidad en 3D. 
       
  Si la vida de marinero solitario no es lo tuyo, ¡invita a tus amigos a una división y pon a prueba tus habilidades cooperativas! Si buscas un reto de altura, ¡únete a un clan, corona la cumbre de la liga de clanes y lucha por hacerte campeón de tu servidor!
       
  Fija tu rumbo por 12 árboles tecnológicos nacionales y ajusta tu estrategia personal al combate naval instalando modificaciones, desbloqueando habilidades para tus comandantes y mejorando el aspecto de tu flota con camuflajes y más artículos estéticos.

La guerre navale n'a jamais été aussi belle !  Téléchargez World of Warships  GRATUITEMENT  et participez à des batailles palpitantes opposant des flottes massives sur une multitude de cartes gigantesques où chaque manœuvre, chaque salve et chaque charge peut faire la différence entre un triomphe éclatant et une défaite écrasante.
       
  Du redoutable Yamato au furtif U-190, explorez un océan quasi infini de styles de jeu à bord de cuirassés, destroyers, croiseurs, sous-marins et porte-avions historiques, tous recréés fidèlement en 3D. 
       
  Si la vie de loup solitaire ne vous convient pas, invitez vos amis dans une division et mettez vos compétences coopératives à l'épreuve ! Si vous êtes à la recherche d'un véritable défi, rejoignez un clan, atteignez le sommet de la ligue de clan et devenez le meilleur de votre serveur !
       
  Naviguez à travers 12 arbres technologiques nationaux et personnalisez votre approche des combats navals en installant des modifications, en débloquant des compétences pour vos commandants et en améliorant l'apparence de votre flotte grâce à des camouflages et d'autres éléments cosmétiques.

Seekrieg hat noch nie so schön ausgesehen!  Ladet euch World of Warships  KOSTENLOS  herunter und stürzt euch in atemberaubende Schlachten zwischen gewaltigen Flotten auf einer Vielzahl von gigantischen Karten, wo jedes Manöver, jede Salve und jeder Vorstoß über größtmöglichen Triumph und vernichtende Niederlage entscheiden kann.
       
  Von der mächtigen Yamato bis zur hinterlistigen U-190 – ein ganzer Ozean vielfältiger Spielstile wartet nur darauf, von euch ergründet zu werden. Geht an Bord historischer Schiffe, von denen jedes originalgetreu in 3D nachgebildet ist: Schlachtschiffe, Zerstörer, Kreuzer, U-Boote und Flugzeugträger. 
       
  Wenn ihr kein einsamer Wolf sein wollt, ladet eure Freunde in eine Division ein und stellt eure Teamfähigkeit auf die Probe! Wenn ihr nach einer echten Herausforderung sucht, tretet einem Clan bei, steigt bis an die Spitze der Clanliga auf und setzt alles daran, auf eurem Server der Beste zu werden!
       
  Bestimmt euren eigenen Kurs durch 12 nationale Forschungsbäume und verfeinert eure ganz persönliche Seekampftechnik. Baut Modifikationen in eure Schiffe ein, schaltet Fertigkeiten für eure Kapitäne frei und verschönert eure Flotte mit Tarnanstrichen und anderen kosmetischen Gegenständen.

La guerra navale non ha mai avuto un aspetto così bello!  Scarica World of Warships  GRATUITAMENTE  e partecipa a battaglie emozionanti tra flotte imponenti su una moltitudine di mappe gigantesche, dove ogni manovra, bordata o avanzata può fare la differenza tra il trionfo assoluto e la sconfitta totale.
       
  Dalla possente Yamato allo sfuggente U-190, esplora un mare quasi infinito di stili di gioco a bordo di storiche corazzate, cacciatorpediniere, incrociatori, sommergibili e portaerei, tutti fedelmente ricreati in 3D. 
       
  Se la vita da lupo solitario non fa per te, invita i tuoi amici a unirsi a una Divisione e metti alla prova le tue capacità di cooperazione! Se sei alla ricerca di una vera sfida, entra a far parte di un Clan, scala le classifiche delle Leghe dei Clan e punta a diventare il migliore sul tuo server!
       
  Traccia una rotta attraverso 12 Alberi tecnologici nazionali e perfeziona il tuo approccio personale al combattimento navale installando potenziamenti, sbloccando abilità per i tuoi Capitani e migliorando l'aspetto della tua flotta con mimetiche e altri elementi cosmetici.

title: SteamWorld Dig
description:
SteamWorld Dig is 2D a platform game that revolves around mining for resources and ores. The objective of the game is to investigate the mines underneath the old Western town Tumbleton in order to unearth the secrets lurking below. The player controls Rusty who is equipped with a pickaxe but the player is given options to upgrade the tools used for digging as progression is made in the game. Besides health, the player also needs coal for light, and water for special abilities.
SteamWorld Dig has platform elements in that the player runs, jumps and encounter foes, but the main objective is mining. That means that the player builds – or rather deconstructs – the game world and creates platforms that way. The player collects resources and other hidden resources which can be brought back to the surface and exchanged for cash. When the player progress in the game new abilities are unlocked. Each playthrough, the mines are randomized, making items and treasure appear in different locations. If the player gets stuck there is a self destruct function, but the players can also buy ladders in the store at the surface to get out of tricky situations.
When progressing deeper down in the cave, the player encounters various enemies with different attack patterns and weak spots. The game features multiple worlds, each with a completely different environment. Dying results in a reparation penalty fee, and the player respawns back on the surface. All the loot that has been accumulated when the player dies can be picked up again.

title: Lethal Company
description: A co-op horror about scavenging at abandoned moons to sell scrap to the Company.

localized_description.text: A co-op horror about scavenging at abandoned moons to sell scrap to the Company.
2023年由Zeekerss开发的电子游戏
2023年的電玩遊戲
2023 early access video game developed by Zeekerss
videojuego de 2023
jeu vidéo de 2023
Computerspiel aus dem Jahr 2023
jogo eletrônico de 2023

A co-op horror roguelite about an abandoned industrial moon.

You are a contracted worker for the Company. Your job is to collect scrap from abandoned, industrialized moons to meet the Company's profit quota. You can use the cash you earn to travel to new moons with higher risks and rewards--or you can buy fancy suits and decorations for your ship. Experience nature, scanning any creature you find to add them to your bestiary. Explore the wondrous outdoors and rummage through their derelict, steel and concrete underbellies. Just never miss the quota.

A co-op horror about scavenging at abandoned moons to sell scrap to the Company.

> OBJECTIVES
You are a contracted worker for the Company. Your job is to collect scrap from abandoned, industrialized moons to meet the Company's profit quota. You can use the cash you earn to travel to new moons with higher risks and rewards--or you can buy fancy suits and decorations for your ship. Experience nature, scanning any creature you find to add them to your bestiary. Explore the wondrous outdoors and rummage through their derelict, steel and concrete underbellies. Just never miss the quota.

> DON'T GO ALONE
These dangers prey upon the vulnerable and lonesome, and the protection of your crew may be your only hope. You can guide your crewmates from your ship, using the radar to call out traps and using the ship's terminal to access remotely locked doors--or you can all go in together. The Company store has many useful tools for the job, including lights, shovels, walkie talkies, stun grenades, or boomboxes.

> WORK FAST
Things get dangerous at night. Communicate with your crewmates to carry all valuables to the ship before things get too dangerous, and try not to leave anyone behind.

 These dangers prey upon the vulnerable and lonesome, and the protection of your crew may be your only hope. You can guide your crewmates from your ship, using the radar to call out traps and using the ship's terminal to access remotely locked doors--or you can all go in together. The Company store has many useful tools for the job, including lights, shovels, walkie talkies, stun grenades, or boomboxes. 
 
       
 
       
 Things get dangerous at night. Communicate with your crewmates to carry all valuables to the ship before things get too dangerous, and try not to leave anyone behind.

You are a contracted worker for the Company. Your job is to collect scrap from abandoned, industrialized moons to meet the Company's profit quota. You can use the cash you earn to travel to new moons with higher risks and rewards--or you can buy fancy suits and decorations for your ship. title: Hacknet
description:
AVAILABLE NOW: HACKNET - LABYRINTHS EXPANSION  Join a small team of elite hackers pulling off a complex series of data heists in Hacknet Labyrinths, a major expansion for critically acclaimed terminal-based hacking simulator, Hacknet.
 
 Adding a new 3-4 hour chapter to the game, Hacknet Labyrinths sees you recruited by the mysterious Kaguya to join a small team of elite hackers on the hunt for powerful new tools and programs.
 
  Hacknet Extensions Mod Tools   Hacknet Extensions , a free suite of mod tools for Hacknet and Hacknet Labyrinths is now available.
 
 You can access Hacknet Extensions via the main menu and use it to create Hacknet campaigns, system networks, nodes, themes, music and story missions. Share your creations with other players through Steam Workshop.
 
 An interactive tutorial has been included in Extensions. This will step you through the process of creating a mod.
 
 There is an extensive guide in the Steam Community hub, and you can connect, collaborate and discuss with other modders in the Hacknet Extensions Discord, linked on the side of the page.
 
  About the Game Hacknet is an immersive, terminal-based hacking simulator for PC. Dive down a rabbit hoIe as you follow the instructions of a recently deceased hacker, whose death may not have been the accident the media reports. Using old school command prompts and real hacking processes, you’ll solve the mystery with minimal hand-holding and a rich world full of secrets to explore.
 
 Bit, a hacker responsible for creating the most invasive security system on the planet, is dead. When he fails to reconnect to his system for 14 days, his failsafe kicks in, sending instructions in automated emails to a lone user.  As that user, it’s up to you to unravel the mystery and ensure that Hacknet-OS doesn't fall into the wrong hands.
 
 Exploring the volatile nature of personal privacy, the prevalence of corporate greed, and the hidden powers of hackers on the internet, Hacknet delivers a true hacking simulation, while offering a support system that allows total beginners get a grasp of the real-world applications and commands found throughout the game. Features 
  Real Hacking 
 Based on actual UNIX commands, Hacknet focuses on real hacking, not the Hollywood-style version of it. This creates a truly immersive experience and puts players right in the thick of trying to break through the firewalls.
 
  Unlock the mystery of Bit 
 A hacker is dead and the media reports don’t add up. When you are contacted by his “ghost” - an automated failsafe system - you’re drawn into the dark and murky world of underground hackers.
 
  Full immersion 
 You are thrust into a persistent virtual world with no “levels” or obvious game elements to break the illusion. Follow the guidance of the emails from Bit or just dive down the rabbit hole, chasing down clues and snippets of information you find as you explore different systems.
 
  Accessible but uncompromising 
 Whilst not holding your hand or dumbing down, the design of the game and the learning curve enables those with no prior terminal experience to enjoy it whilst delighting those in the know.
 
  Killer tunes 
 Hack to the beat of a soundtrack featuring underground artists including Carpenter Brut (Hotline Miami) and Remi Gallego (AKA The Algorithm).
 Soundtrack produced in association with The Otherworld Agency.
 
  Hack your own adventures 
 Create your own campaigns, system networks, nodes, themes, music and story missions using the Hacknet Extensions mod tools. Share them with other players through Steam Workshop.

HACKNET LABYRINTHS - 现已推出  加入黑客精英小队，破解《黑客网络：迷宫》中复杂的数据。广受好评的终端黑客模拟游戏《黑客网络》的重大扩展包!
 加入了一个3-4小时流程的全新章节，《黑客网络：迷宫》中你将由神秘人Kaguya招募到一个黑客精英团队，寻找强大的新工具与程序。
 
  Hacknet Extensions Mod Tools   Hacknet Extensions , a free suite of mod tools for Hacknet and Hacknet Labyrinths is now available.
 
 You can access Hacknet Extensions via the main menu and use it to create Hacknet campaigns, system networks, nodes, themes, music and story missions. Share your creations with other players through Steam Workshop.
 
 An interactive tutorial has been included in Extensions. This will step you through the process of creating a mod.
 
 There is an extensive guide in the Steam Community hub, and you can connect, collaborate and discuss with other modders in the Hacknet Extensions Discord, linked on the side of the page.
 
  关于游戏 Hacknet是一款身临其境，基于终端的黑客模拟器。你将跟随一位最近刚过世的黑客，通过他遗留的线索，来探询混乱未知的网络世界。他的死可能并非像媒体所报道的意外那么简单。只需进行简单的教学，你便能使用基础的指令来完成真实的骇入过程，探索这充满了谜团的黑客世界。
 
 Bit, 一位负责开发世界上最具攻击性的骇入系统的黑客，去世了。当他的系统连续14天都没有检测到他的操作后，系统的保险程序便开始运行，将他未完成的计划发给了一位陌生的用户。作为这名用户，你需要决定是否一步步揭开事实的真相，并且确保Hacknet操作系统不会落入到不法之徒手中。
 
 Hacknet能够为你提供一个全方位的真实黑客模拟器，可以让你探索人类窥探隐私的天性、制止企业贪婪盛行并暗中对抗隐藏在网络世界中的强大黑客，同时它又能提供学习支持，可以让一个真正的电脑小白通过游戏来掌握现实世界的电脑命令和对应用程序的操控。 游戏特色 
  真实的骇入 
 基于真实的UNIX指令，Hacknet将重点放在真实的骇入过程，而不是追求炫酷的好莱坞式黑客。通过拟真化的骇入过程，让玩家们仿佛置身骇入现场，体验打破防火墙时几近真实的感受。
 
  探寻Bit的死亡之谜 
 一位黑客莫名死亡，而媒体们的报道根本无法自圆其说。跟随着他的“灵魂”（一个自动邮件发送系统）带给你的指示，你将会慢慢深入并参与到一个黑暗而又庞大的黑客阴谋之中。
 
  完全的浸入式体验 
 你将会被带入一个无尽的虚拟黑客世界，在这里没有"级别"或者是明显的游戏元素来打破这一体验。你可以选择跟随Bit的邮件的指引，或是直接遨游在整个服务器网络之中，探索并追寻信息的蛛丝马迹。
 
  上手简单精通难 
 本游戏不会限制你的游戏方式或让你按部就班 游戏内容和学习曲线的设计，能够让初学者或有终端操作经验的人都能找到一份属于自己的快乐。
 
  杀手级音乐 
 Hacknet原声带由underground风格音乐家创作，包括Carpenter Brut (Hotline Miami)和Remi Gallego (又名The Algorithm)。
 本游戏原声带由The Otherworld Agency协助创作
