Lege das Aussehen, die Verhaltensweise und die Kleidung deiner Sims fest und entscheide, wie sie jeden einzelnen Tag verbringen. Entwirf und baue fantastische Häuser für jede Familie und richte sie mit Möbeln und Deko nach deinem Geschmack ein. Besuche verschiedene Nachbarschaften, um andere Sims zu treffen und mehr über ihr Leben zu erfahren. Entdecke wunderschöne Schauplätze mit einzigartigen Landschaften und stürze dich spontan in Abenteuer. Meistere die Höhen und Tiefen des alltäglichen Lebens und beobachte was geschieht, wenn du Szenarien aus deinem Leben nachspielst. Erzähle deine Geschichten auf deine Art, während du Beziehungen aufbaust, Karrieren und Lebensziele verfolgst und immer tiefer in dieses außergewöhnliche Spiel eintauchst, in dem die Möglichkeiten endlos sind.
 
  Kostenloser Download – Das Die Sims 4-Basisspiel kann kostenlos heruntergeladen werden. Erzähle ihre Lebensgeschichten, während du lebendige Welten erkundest und neue Arten entdeckst, du selbst zu sein.

Escolhe a aparência dos teus Sims, como agem e se vestem e depois decide como viverão o seu dia-a-dia. Desenha e constrói casas incríveis para todas as famílias e depois decora-as com o teu mobiliário e decoração favoritos. Conta as tuas histórias à tua maneira desenvolvendo relacionamentos, seguindo carreiras e aspirações de vida, e envolvendo-te neste jogo extraordinário, onde as possibilidades não têm fim.

  Consegue mais com o EA Play – Os membros do EA Play podem expandir as suas possibilidades de carreira com The Sims 4 Get to Work Expansion Pack.

「ザ・シムズ」がDiscordに登場！     
 
  ゲームについて 何を目指すかはあなた次第。想像力をはばたかせて、ユニークなシムズの世界を作ろう。シムやマイホーム、その他のすべてをあれこれ試して、とことんカスタマイズ。シムの外見や動き方、ファッションを決めて、生きる目標を選択しよう。すべての家族のために素敵なマイホームを建てたら、お気に入りの家具でインテリアも完璧に。いろいろなエリアを訪ねて、いろいろなシムと出会い、ひとりひとりのドラマに触れてみよう。さまざまな環境の美しいスポットを見つけたら、思いがけないアドベンチャーに出発進行。泣いたり笑ったりのシムの毎日をあなたはどう過ごす？シムの世界であなたの日常を再現して、何が起こるかを見てみよう。自由なやり方で物語を紡ぎながら、恋におちたり、仕事で出世したり、人生の目標をかなえたり。これは無限の可能性がある特別なゲーム。
 
  無料ダウンロード  - 「The Sims™ 4」のベースゲームを、無料でダウンロードしよう。豊富なオプションで家を建てたり、シムをスタイリングしたり、彼らの個性を自由にカスタマイズ。シムたちの人生の物語を作りながら、活気に満ちた世界を探検し、より豊かな自分らしさを発見しよう！
 
       
       
       
       
       
 
  EA Play  でもっと楽しもう — EA Playのメンバーは「The Sims 4 Get to Work」拡張パックでキャリアの可能性を広げよう。

Slip fantasien løs, og dyk ned i en verden af simmere, som du kan udtrykke dig med. Download spillet gratis, og tilpas alle detaljer – fra simmere til deres hjem og meget mere. Vælg, hvordan dine simmere skal se ud, agere og klæde sig, i en hverdag som du stykker sammen for dem. Design fantastiske hjem til hver af dine familier, og vælg dine yndlingsmøbler og din foretrukne indretning. Besøg andre nabolag, hvor du kan møde andre simmere og høre om deres liv. Gå på opdagelse i smukke og særprægede omgivelser. Hjælp dine simmere gennem livets lav- og højdepunkter, og se, hvad der sker, når du spiller scenarier fra dit eget liv! Fortæl dine historier, lige som du vil, når du udforsker nye forhold, karrierevalg og ambitioner i dette ekstraordinære spil, hvor mulighederne er uendelige. Leg med livet!

Sbriglia la tua immaginazione e crea un mondo di Sims che esprimano la tua personalità! Scarica gratis e personalizza ogni dettaglio dei Sims, delle abitazioni e molto altro! Scegli in che modo i Sims appaiono, si comportano e si vestono, poi decidi come vivranno giorno dopo giorno. Progetta e costruisci case incredibili per ogni famiglia, poi decorale con i mobili e gli arredi che preferisci. Visita i vari quartieri dove potrai conoscere altri Sims e saperne di più sulle loro vite. Scopri splendide località dalle ambientazioni sempre diverse e intraprendi avventure sull'onda del momento. Gestisci gli alti e bassi della quotidianità dei Sims, e scopri che succede ricreando le situazioni della vita reale. Racconta le tue storie a modo tuo mentre sviluppi relazioni, intraprendi carriere, persegui aspirazioni di vita e ti immergi in questo gioco straordinario dalle infinite possibilità.
 
  Scarica gratis – Il gioco base The Sims 4 è scaricabile gratis! Avrai una miriade di opzioni per costruire le case, vestire i Sims e definire le loro personalità. Inventa le loro storie di vita mentre esplori scenari vivaci e scopri nuovi modi di essere te.

  Ottieni il massimo con EA Play  – I membri di EA Play possono ampliare le proprie opportunità di carriera con The Sims 4 Al Lavoro! Expansion Pack.

title: Company of Heroes 2
description:
Powered by the Essence Engine 3.0, the Company of Heroes 2 series feature some unique mechanics rewarding thoughtful players. From the TrueSight™ system that emulates the units’ line of sight to the cover-system that encourages clever unit placement – not to mention the combined arms approach and the hard and soft counters gameplay that will make you think twice before trying to destroy a tank with a simple squad of riflemen – each game presents players with an uninterrupted stream of meaningful tactical choices that can turn the tide of war.
      PICK YOUR FIGHT   NB:  multiplayer standalones allow you to  play on any map against anyone  owning any COH2 product.
 
 
  The Company of Heroes 2 base game  gives you access to two multiplayer armies from the Eastern Front: the Red Army (SOV) and the Wehrmacht Ostheer (GER). It also comes with a gritty single-player campaign that will give you a chance to familiarize yourself with the series core tenets. Step into the boots of a Soviet commander of the Red Army, entrenched in brutal frontline warfare to free Mother Russia from the Enemy invaders! Adjust your tactics to take into account the brutal weather conditions and wield the might of the Soviet Empire as you smash your way to Berlin.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: The Western Front Armies  adds two new factions from the Western Front to the roster of playable multiplayer armies: the Oberkommando West (OKW) and the US Forces (USF). While the former puts you in charge of an aggressive and powerful army with very specialized and elite units – yet in very limited numbers – the latter introduces an expeditionary corps that allows for a variety of approaches and very powerful combined arms tactics, but which inevitably falls a bit short in the heavy armor department.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: Ardennes Assault  offers a compelling single-player campaign for the USF faction revolving around the Battle of the Bulge. Engage in a dynamic non-linear campaign across the Ardennes landscape consisting of 18 scenarios, choose between three iconic companies, customize their abilities and bear the consequences of your actions as overall company health persists between missions.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: The British Forces  is the latest entry in the series and features this iconic Allied army from WWII (UKF). Experience a unique tech-tree that challenges the player to balance the constant trade-off between mobility and defense. Surprise your opponents with your development choices and an open end game configuration. Enjoy an army with character and distinctive units & abilities, from the Churchill Crocodile flamethrower tank to the RAF glider.
      KEY FEATURES    AWARD WINNING FRANCHISE
 Sequel to the highest rated strategy game of all time returns with an innovative warfare experience that will redefine the Strategy genre once more
   ESSENCE ENGINE 3.0
 Cutting-edge technology that increases the graphical quality and accuracy of deadly combat with the unprecedented TrueSight™ system, the ultrarealistic ColdTech™ dynamic weather that changes strategic warfare forever and improved environmental destruction
   TACTICAL WARFARE
 Develop and utilize your new Commander Abilities and experience the up-close moment-to-moment brutality of frontline warfare through new Dynamic Battle Tactics
   INTENSE ONLINE COMBAT
 Featuring the great competitive and co-operative multiplayer that fans have grown to expect from this high-quality and critically acclaimed franchise       MULTIPLAYER ARMIES COMPARISON  Find out the multiplayer army (and associated game/standalone) that suits your play style.

Powered by the Essence Engine 3.0, the Company of Heroes 2 series feature some unique mechanics rewarding thoughtful players. From the TrueSight™ system that emulates the units’ line of sight to the cover-system that encourages clever unit placement – not to mention the combined arms approach and the hard and soft counters gameplay that will make you think twice before trying to destroy a tank with a simple squad of riflemen – each game presents players with an uninterrupted stream of meaningful tactical choices that can turn the tide of war.
      PICK YOUR FIGHT   NB:  multiplayer standalones allow you to  play on any map against anyone  owning any COH2 product.
 
 
  The Company of Heroes 2 base game  gives you access to two multiplayer armies from the Eastern Front: the Red Army (SOV) and the Wehrmacht Ostheer (GER). It also comes with a gritty single-player campaign that will give you a chance to familiarize yourself with the series core tenets. Step into the boots of a Soviet commander of the Red Army, entrenched in brutal frontline warfare to free Mother Russia from the Enemy invaders! Adjust your tactics to take into account the brutal weather conditions and wield the might of the Soviet Empire as you smash your way to Berlin.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: The Western Front Armies  adds two new factions from the Western Front to the roster of playable multiplayer armies: the Oberkommando West (OKW) and the US Forces (USF). While the former puts you in charge of an aggressive and powerful army with very specialized and elite units – yet in very limited numbers – the latter introduces an expeditionary corps that allows for a variety of approaches and very powerful combined arms tactics, but which inevitably falls a bit short in the heavy armor department.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: Ardennes Assault  offers a compelling single-player campaign for the USF faction revolving around the Battle of the Bulge. Engage in a dynamic non-linear campaign across the Ardennes landscape consisting of 18 scenarios, choose between three iconic companies, customize their abilities and bear the consequences of your actions as overall company health persists between missions.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: The British Forces  is the latest entry in the series and features this iconic Allied army from WWII (UKF). Experience a unique tech-tree that challenges the player to balance the constant trade-off between mobility and defense. Surprise your opponents with your development choices and an open end game configuration. Enjoy an army with character and distinctive units & abilities, from the Churchill Crocodile flamethrower tank to the RAF glider.

Con tecnología Essence Engine 3.0, la serie de Company of Heroes 2 aporta una mecánica de juego única para los jugadores más avezados. Cuenta con el sistema TrueSight™, para emular la línea de visión de las unidades, un sistema de cobertura, que sugiere una colocación más inteligente de las unidades, y un enfoque centrado en el armamento combinado y en una jugabilidad en la que lo esencial es saber contrarrestar a gran y pequeña escala que te harán pensar dos veces antes de destruir un tanque con una sola unidad de fusileros, pues cada partida te presenta una serie de importantes decisiones tácticas que podrán cambiar las tornas de la contienda.
      ELIGE TU LUCHA   NB :  cada una con sus ejércitos con los que jugar a partidas multijugador  en cualquier mapa contra quien tenga  un producto COH2.
 
 
  El juego básico de Company of Heroes 2  te da acceso a dos ejércitos multijugadores del frente oriental: el Ejército Rojo (SOV) y la Wehrmacht Ostheer (GER). Además, incluye una poderosa campaña para Un jugador que te dará la oportunidad de familiarizarte con las principales dinámicas de la serie. Métete en la piel de un comandante soviético del Ejército Rojo atrincherado en un frente bélico brutal para salvar a la Madre Rusia de los invasores enemigos. Ajusta tus tácticas para contrarrestar las terribles condiciones climatológicas y despliega todo el poderío soviético mientras te abres camino para llegar a Berlín.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: The Western Front Armies  añade dos nuevas facciones del frente occidental a la lista de ejércitos utilizables en los modos multijugador: el Oberkommando West (OKW) y las US Forces (USF). El Oberkommando te pone al mando de un ejército agresivo y poderoso con unas unidades de élite muy especializadas, si bien escasas en número, y las US Forces aportan un cuerpo expedicionario que te permitirá asumir diferentes enfoques y una táctica muy poderosa de armas combinadas, aunque carece de suficientes carros pesados.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: Ardennes Assault  te ofrece una vertiginosa campaña para Un jugador con las US Forces que tiene lugar en la batalla de las Ardenas. Sumérgete en una dinámica campaña no lineal en los bosques de las Ardenas con 18 escenarios, elige entre tres icónicas compañías, personaliza sus habilidades y sufre las consecuencias de tus acciones mientras intentas mantener alta la salud de tu compañía entre misiones
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: The British Forces  es la última entrega de la serie e incluye a este importante ejército de la IIGM (UKF). Explora un árbol tecnológico exclusivo que te desafiará a compensar constantemente el equilibrio entre movilidad y defensa. Sorprende a tus oponentes con las distintas opciones para desarrollarte y una configuración abierta de fin de juego. Juega con un ejército con unidades y habilidades propias, como el tanque Churchill Crocodile con lanzallamas o el planeador de la R.A.F.
      CARACTERÍSTICAS PRINCIPALES    UNA GALARDONADA FRANQUICIA
 Te traemos la nueva entrega del juego de estrategia más aclamado por la crítica de todos los tiempos y, con ella, una innovativa dinámica bélica de juego que sin duda dará una nueva vuelta de tuerca al género.
   ESSENCE ENGINE 3.0
 La tecnología más avanzada para incrementar la calidad gráfica y la precisión en los enfrentamientos a vida o muerte con el novedoso sistema TrueSight™, la hiperrealista climatología dinámica ColdTech™, que cambiará para siempre el concepto de guerra estratégica y que inflige un realismo sin precedentes a la destrucción del entorno.
   GUERRA TÁCTICA
 Desarrolla y utiliza las nuevas habilidades de tus comandantes y siente de primera mano la brutalidad del frente bélico mediante nuevas y dinámicas tácticas de combate.
   INTENSOS COMBATES EN LÍNEA
 Juega en modo multijugador en los modos competitivo o cooperativo que tan locos ha vuelto a los fans de esta premiada y exitosa franquicia.       COMPARACIÓN ENTRE EJÉRCITOS MULTIJUGADOR  Encuentra el ejército multijugador (y el juego/expansión independiente) que va mejor a tu estilo de juego.

Fonctionnant grâce au moteur de jeu Essence Engine 3.0, la série Company of Heroes 2 offre des mécaniques uniques récompensant les joueurs minutieux. Avec le système TrueSight™ permettant l'émulation de la ligne de mire des unités, le système de couverture qui encourage l'élaboration stratégique des déplacements de troupes, ou encore l'approche des armes combinées et le gameplay de ripostes plus ou moins équilibrées (qui vous feront réfléchir à deux fois avant de détruire un char avec une simple section de fusiliers). Chaque jeu offre aux joueurs un flot continu de choix tactiques qui peuvent changer le cours de la guerre.
      CHOISISSEZ VOTRE BATAILLE   NB :  Les extensions multijoueur vous permettent de jouer  sur n'importe quelle carte contre n'importe qui  possédant un titre de la série COH2.
 
 
  Le jeu de base Company of Heroes 2  vous donne accès aux deux armées multijoueur du front de l'Est : l'Armée rouge (SOV) et l'Ostheer de la Wehrmacht (GER). Il vous offre aussi une campagne un joueur ardue, où vous pourrez vous familiariser avec les atouts majeurs de la série. Enfilez le costume du commandant soviétique de l'Armée rouge, engagé dans une guerre brutale pour libérer la Mère Russie des intrus ennemis ! Ajustez vos tactiques en tenant compte des conditions météorologiques violentes, et faites valoir la puissance de l'Empire soviétique pendant que vous avancez jusqu'à Berlin.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: The Western Front Armies  ajoute à la composition des armées jouables en multijoueur deux nouvelles factions venues du front de l'ouest : l'Oberkommando West (OKW) et les US Forces (USF). Alors que la première vous hisse à la tête d'une armée agressive et puissante dotée d'unités d'élite très spécialisées (mais en nombre limité), la dernière introduit un corps expéditionnaire permettant une variété d'approches et des tactiques d'armes combinées très puissantes, mais qui fatalement souffre de carences au niveau des blindés lourds.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: Ardennes Assault  propose une captivante campagne un joueur pour la faction de l'USF et se déroule principalement pendant la bataille des Ardennes. Plongez dans une campagne dynamique et changeante à travers les paysages des Ardennes. 18 scénarios vous sont proposés, choisissez entre trois compagnies emblématiques, personnalisez leurs compétences et assumez les conséquences de vos actes alors que la santé générale de la compagnie reste inchangée entre les missions.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: The British Forces  est le dernier opus de la série et inclut cette armée alliée emblématique de la Seconde Guerre Mondiale (UKF). Découvrez un arbre de techniques unique qui vous pousse à chercher constamment un compromis entre la mobilité et la défense. Surprenez vos adversaires avec vos choix de développement et en configurant librement la fin du jeu. Jouez avec une armée pleine de caractère et dotée d'unités et compétences particulières, du char lance-flammes Churchill Crocodile au planeur RAF.
      CARACTÉRISTIQUES MAJEURES    FRANCHISE À SUCCÈS
 Le jeu de stratégie le mieux noté de tous les temps revient avec une expérience de combat innovante qui redéfinit une fois de plus le genre stratégique
   ESSENCE ENGINE 3.0
 La technologie de pointe augmente la qualité graphique et la précision des combats féroces grâce au système inédit TrueSight™, le moteur ultra réaliste des conditions météorologiques dynamiques ColdTech™ apporte une nouvelle dimension à la guerre stratégique avec la destruction du terrain améliorée
   GUERRE TACTIQUE
 Développez et utilisez vos nouvelles compétences de commandant et vivez l'extrême brutalité des combats sur le front grâce aux nouvelles tactiques de bataille dynamiques
   COMBAT EN LIGNE INTENSE
 Inclut le très compétitif et coopératif mode multijoueur que les fans attendent d'une franchise d'aussi bonne qualité et primée par la critique       COMPARATIF DES ARMÉES EN MULTIJOUEUR  Trouvez l'armée multijoueur (et le jeu associé/standalone) qui correspond à votre style.

Die von Essence Engine 3.0 angetriebene Company of Heroes 2-Serie bietet einige einzigartige Funktionen, mit denen vorsichtige Spieler belohnt werden. Das TrueSight™-System emuliert die Sichtlinie von Einheiten und ein cleveres Deckungssystem ermutigt eine sinnvolle Platzierung von Einheiten. Darüber hinaus sorgen das Waffenverbundspiel sowie „Hard Counter“- und „Soft Counter“-Taktiken dafür, dass Sie sich genau überlegen, ob es sich wirklich lohnt, einen Panzer mit Schützenfeuer anzugreifen. Jedes Spiel versorgt Spieler mit einem ununterbrochenen Spektrum an sinnvollen taktischen Optionen, mithilfe derer der Kriegsverlauf entscheidend beeinflusst werden kann.
      WÄHLEN SIE IHRE ARMEE   NB :  Mit Mehrspielererweiterungen können  Sie auf jeder Karte gegen jeden Spieler  mit einem COH2-Spiel antreten.
 
 
 Im  Company of Heroes 2-Hauptspiel  stehen zwei Mehrspielerarmeen von der Ostfront zur Verfügung: die Rote Armee (SOV) und das Ostheer der Wehrmacht (GER). Außerdem steht hier eine harte Einzelspielerkampagne zur Verfügung, in der Sie sich mit den Grundlagen der Serie vertraut machen können. Treten Sie als Kommandant der sowjetischen Roten Armee an und befreien Sie in brutalen Frontkämpfen Mütterchen Russland von den feindlichen Invasoren! Passen Sie Ihre Taktiken entsprechend der brutalen Wetterbedingungen an und demonstrieren Sie die unerbittliche Macht des sowjetischen Imperiums auf seinem Vormarsch nach Berlin.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: „The Western Front Armies“  fügt der Liste spielbarer Mehrspielerarmeen zwei neue Westfront-Fraktionen hinzu: Oberkommando West (OKW) und US Forces (USF). In Ersterer kommandieren Sie eine aggressive und mächtige Armee mit wenigen hochspezialisierten Eliteeinheiten, in Letzterer befehligen Sie eine Expeditionsstreitkraft, die zwar vielfältige Strategien und äußerst wirksame Waffenverbundtaktiken zulässt, aber keine besonders gut gerüstete schwere Panzerdivision aufweist.
 
 
 
 In   Company of Heroes 2: „Ardennes Assault“  kämpfen Sie in einer spannenden Einzelspielerkampagne als US Forces in den Ardennen gegen die Wehrmacht. Nehmen Sie an einer dynamischen, nichtlinearen Kampagne in den Ardennen mit 18 Szenarios teil, wählen Sie zwischen drei wichtigen Kompanien, passen Sie deren Fähigkeiten an und tragen Sie die Konsequenzen Ihrer Entscheidungen: der Zustand Ihrer Kompanie bleibt nämlich zwischen Missionen erhalten.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: „The British Forces“  ist die neueste Folge der Serie und enthält diese ruhmreiche Alliiertenarmee des 2. Weltkriegs (UKF). Mit dem einzigartigen Tech-Baum gleichen Sie Mobilität und Verteidigung aus und erhalten zwei Fraktionen zum Preis von einer. Überraschen Sie Ihre Gegner mit geschickten taktischen Entscheidungen und erleben Sie eine Spielkonfiguration mit offenem Ende. Erleben Sie eine brillante Armee mit charakteristischen Fähigkeiten und starkem Kriegsgerät wie beispielsweise den Churchill Crocodile-Flammenwerferpanzer oder den RAF-Segler.
      WICHTIGE MERKMALE    PREISGEKRÖNTE SERIE
 Die Fortsetzung des bestbewerteten Strategiespiels glänzt mit einem innovativen Kriegsspielerlebnis, das das Strategiegenre revolutionieren wird.
   ESSENCE ENGINE 3.0
 Innovative Technologie, die Spielgrafik auf ein bislang unübertroffenes Niveau erhebt: verbesserte Genauigkeit tödlicher Gefechte mit dem unübertroffenen TrueSight™-System, ultrarealistisches, dynamisches Wetter mit dem ColdTech™-System für ein revolutionäres Strategiespielerlebnis sowie optimierte Umgebungszerstörung.
   TAKTISCHE KRIEGFÜHRUNG
 Entwickeln und nutzen Sie Ihre neuen Kommandantenfähigkeiten und erleben Sie mithilfe neuer dynamischer Kampftaktiken die Brutalität von Frontkämpfen aus nächster Nähe.
   INTENSIVE ONLINE-GEFECHTE
 Mit den großartigen kompetitiven und kooperativen Mehrspielermodi, die Fans von dieser hochwertigen und hochgelobten Serie erwarten.       MEHRSPIELERARMEEN - VERGLEICH  Finden Sie die Mehrspielerarmee (und das dazugehörige Spiel oder die eigenständige Erweiterung), die zu Ihrem Spielstil passt.

Powered by the Essence Engine 3.0, the Company of Heroes 2 series feature some unique mechanics rewarding thoughtful players. From the TrueSight™ system that emulates the units’ line of sight to the cover-system that encourages clever unit placement – not to mention the combined arms approach and the hard and soft counters gameplay that will make you think twice before trying to destroy a tank with a simple squad of riflemen – each game presents players with an uninterrupted stream of meaningful tactical choices that can turn the tide of war.
      PICK YOUR FIGHT   NB:  multiplayer standalones allow you to  play on any map against anyone  owning any COH2 product.
 
 
  The Company of Heroes 2 base game  gives you access to two multiplayer armies from the Eastern Front: the Red Army (SOV) and the Wehrmacht Ostheer (GER). It also comes with a gritty single-player campaign that will give you a chance to familiarize yourself with the series core tenets. Step into the boots of a Soviet commander of the Red Army, entrenched in brutal frontline warfare to free Mother Russia from the Enemy invaders! Adjust your tactics to take into account the brutal weather conditions and wield the might of the Soviet Empire as you smash your way to Berlin.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: The Western Front Armies  adds two new factions from the Western Front to the roster of playable multiplayer armies: the Oberkommando West (OKW) and the US Forces (USF). While the former puts you in charge of an aggressive and powerful army with very specialized and elite units – yet in very limited numbers – the latter introduces an expeditionary corps that allows for a variety of approaches and very powerful combined arms tactics, but which inevitably falls a bit short in the heavy armor department.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: Ardennes Assault  offers a compelling single-player campaign for the USF faction revolving around the Battle of the Bulge. Engage in a dynamic non-linear campaign across the Ardennes landscape consisting of 18 scenarios, choose between three iconic companies, customize their abilities and bear the consequences of your actions as overall company health persists between missions.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: The British Forces  is the latest entry in the series and features this iconic Allied army from WWII (UKF). Experience a unique tech-tree that challenges the player to balance the constant trade-off between mobility and defense. Surprise your opponents with your development choices and an open end game configuration. Enjoy an army with character and distinctive units & abilities, from the Churchill Crocodile flamethrower tank to the RAF glider.
      KEY FEATURES    AWARD WINNING FRANCHISE
 Sequel to the highest rated strategy game of all time returns with an innovative warfare experience that will redefine the Strategy genre once more
   ESSENCE ENGINE 3.0
 Cutting-edge technology that increases the graphical quality and accuracy of deadly combat with the unprecedented TrueSight™ system, the ultrarealistic ColdTech™ dynamic weather that changes strategic warfare forever and improved environmental destruction
   TACTICAL WARFARE
 Develop and utilize your new Commander Abilities and experience the up-close moment-to-moment brutality of frontline warfare through new Dynamic Battle Tactics
   INTENSE ONLINE COMBAT
 Featuring the great competitive and co-operative multiplayer that fans have grown to expect from this high-quality and critically acclaimed franchise       MULTIPLAYER ARMIES COMPARISON  Find out the multiplayer army (and associated game/standalone) that suits your play style.

Alimentata dal motore Essence Engine 3.0, la serie Company of Heroes 2 si avvale di alcune meccaniche uniche, a vantaggio dei giocatori particolarmente attenti. Dal sistema TrueSight™, che emula la visuale delle unità, al sistema di copertura, che incoraggia il piazzamento attento delle unità stesse (per non parlare dell’approccio combinato delle armi e del gameplay con hard counter e soft counter che ti costringerà a pensarci due volte prima di tentare di distruggere un carro armato con una semplice squadra di fucilieri), ogni gioco costringe continuamente i giocatori a dover effettuare significative scelte tattiche che possono cambiare il corso della guerra.
      SCEGLI LA TUA BATTAGLIA   NB :  Le espansioni multigiocatore ti permettono di giocare  su ogni mappa contro chiunque  possieda un qualsiasi prodotto della serie COH2.
 
 
  Il gioco di base Company of Heroes 2   ti dà accesso a due eserciti multigiocatore dal fronte orientale: l’Armata Rossa (SOV) e la Wehrmacht (GER). Inoltre include una realistica campagna per giocatore singolo che ti darà la possibilità di familiarizzare con i principi cardine della serie. Mettiti nei panni di un comandante sovietico dell’Armata Rossa, nella trincea della brutale linea del fronte, impegnato nella missione di liberare la Madre Russia dagli invasori nemici! Modifica le tue tattiche tenendo conto delle brutali condizioni meteorologiche e utilizza la potenza dell’Impero sovietico per farti strada fino a Berlino.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: The Western Front Armies  aggiunge due nuove fazioni dal fronte occidentale al gruppo di eserciti multigiocatore giocabili: l’Oberkommando West (OKW) e le US Forces (USF). Mentre il primo ti mette al comando di un esercito aggressivo e potente fatto di unità d’élite altamente specializzate, seppure in numero limitato, il secondo introduce un corpo di spedizione che permette una grande varietà di approcci e potenti tattiche combinate, ma che inevitabilmente è più debole nel dipartimento dei corazzati pesanti.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: Ardennes Assault  offre un’avvincente campagna per giocatore singolo nei panni della fazione US Forces, impegnata nell’Offensiva delle Ardenne. Affronta una campagna non lineare e dinamica attraverso le Ardenne fatta di 18 diversi scenari e scegli tra tre iconiche compagnie, personalizza le loro abilità e affronta le conseguenze delle tue azioni, in quanto lo stato di salute generale della compagnia rimane uguale tra una missione e l’altra.
 
 
 
   Company of Heroes 2: The British Forces  è l’ultimo episodio della serie e include questo iconico esercito degli Alleati della Seconda guerra mondiale (UKF). Prova un albero tecnologico unico che metterà alla prova l’abilità dei giocatori nel dover continuamente bilanciare la mobilità e la difesa. Sorprendi i tuoi avversari con le tue scelte di sviluppo e una configurazione di gioco totalmente aperta. Divertiti con un esercito di grande personalità e unità e abilità distintive, dal carro lanciafiamme Churchill Crocodile all’aliante della RAF.
      FUNZIONI CHIAVE    UNA PREMIATA SERIE
 Il sequel del gioco di strategia con le migliori valutazioni di tutti i tempi ritorna con un’innovativa esperienza di warfare che ridefinirà il genere ancora una volta
   ESSENCE ENGINE 3.0
 Tecnologia all’avanguardia che migliora la qualità grafica e il realismo di combattimenti letali con il sistema senza precedenti TrueSight™, l’ultrarealistico sistema meteorologico dinamico ColdTech™ che cambierà i giochi di strategia bellici per sempre e una migliore distruzione dell’ambientazione
   WARFARE TATTICO
 Sviluppa e utilizza le tue nuove abilità del comandante e prova direttamente sulla tua pelle la brutalità del fronte con le nuove tattiche di battaglia dinamiche
   INTENSI COMBATTIMENTI ONLINE
 La grande modalità multigiocatore competitiva e cooperativa che i fan hanno imparato ad aspettarsi da questa serie di altissima qualità acclamata dalla critica       RAFFRONTO ESERCITI MULTIGIOCATORE  Trova l'esercito multigiocatore (e la versione autonoma associata) che si addice meglio al tuo stile di gioco.

title: Tabletop Simulator
description:
VR Support  Take your tabletop gaming to a whole new level in virtual reality with the HTC Vive & Oculus Rift! And what's more, both VR and non-VR players alike can play together in the same game room!
 
  About the Game Create your own original games, import custom assets, automate games with scripting, set up complete RPG dungeons, manipulate the physics, create hinges & joints, and of course flip the table when you are losing the game. All with an easy to use system integrated with Steam Workshop. You can do anything you want in Tabletop Simulator. The possibilities are endless!
 
     Endless Games 
 Tabletop Simulator has it all. The base game includes 15 classics like Chess, Poker, Jigsaw Puzzles, Dominoes, and Mahjong. Additionally, there are thousands of community created content on the Workshop. If you’re the tabletop gaming type, we include an RPG Kit which has tilesets & furniture, as well as animated figurines that you can set up and battle with your friends, with even more options in the Chest. There’s even an option for Game Masters so they can control the table!
 
     Create Games 
 If you’re into creativity and prototyping, you can easily create your own games by importing images onto custom boards & tables, create custom decks, import 3D models, create scripts, and much more. You can choose to upload your creations on the Steam Workshop or share them privately with your friends.
 
     Fun For All Ages 
 Everyone can play Tabletop Simulator! Play a classic board game with grandma, have poker night with the guys, or start your epic RPG adventure with your crew. Play almost any tabletop game you can think of! Being a multiplayer-focused game, up to  10  players can play at any given time. 
 
     DLCs 
 Our downloadable content (DLCs) are different from other games, as we partner with developers and publishers to bring their games into Tabletop Simulator. Each DLC is custom created with  high quality assets and  special themes that match their games. And best of all, only the host needs to own the DLC for everyone at the table to play.
 
    
 
  Key Features :
 
   Online sandbox with unlimited games to play how you want.
   Multiplayer physics with objects that collide and interact just how you would expect. 
   Create your own mods easily with full Steam Workshop support and 3D model importing. 
   Take games to the next level with Lua scripting support.
   Play just like you do in real life; pick up, rotate, shake, and throw any object.
   Up to 10 people can play together on the same table.
   Team system with voice and text chat.
   Save & load individual objects and complete games.
   Hotseat allows you to play locally on the same computer with your friends.
   Browse the internet, listen to music, and watch videos in multiplayer, in-game on a tablet. 
   Perfect for RPGs - build your very own roleplaying dungeons with our modular tileset, RPG Kit, Multiple States and Tablet (useful for character sheets). 
   Great admin tools to enable or disable player permissions and to eliminate griefing in public games. 
   360° panoramic backgrounds that change the lighting and atmosphere. 
   Included games: Backgammon, Cards, Chess, Checkers, Chinese Checkers, Custom Board, Dice, Dominoes, Go, Jigsaw Puzzles, Mahjong, Pachisi, Piecepack, Poker, Reversi, RPG Kit, Sandbox, Solitaire, and Tablet.

 If you’re into creativity and prototyping, you can easily create your own games by importing images onto custom boards & tables, create custom decks, import 3D models, create scripts, and much more. You can choose to upload your creations on the Steam Workshop or share them privately with your friends.
 
     Fun For All Ages 
 Everyone can play Tabletop Simulator! Play a classic board game with grandma, have poker night with the guys, or start your epic RPG adventure with your crew. Play almost any tabletop game you can think of! Being a multiplayer-focused game, up to  10  players can play at any given time. 
 
     DLCs 
 Our downloadable content (DLCs) are different from other games, as we partner with developers and publishers to bring their games into Tabletop Simulator. Each DLC is custom created with  high quality assets and  special themes that match their games. And best of all, only the host needs to own the DLC for everyone at the table to play.
 
    
 
  Key Features :
 
   Online sandbox with unlimited games to play how you want.
   Multiplayer physics with objects that collide and interact just how you would expect. 
   Create your own mods easily with full Steam Workshop support and 3D model importing. 
   Take games to the next level with Lua scripting support.
   Play just like you do in real life; pick up, rotate, shake, and throw any object.
   Up to 10 people can play together on the same table.
   Team system with voice and text chat.
   Save & load individual objects and complete games.
   Hotseat allows you to play locally on the same computer with your friends.
   Browse the internet, listen to music, and watch videos in multiplayer, in-game on a tablet. 
   Perfect for RPGs - build your very own roleplaying dungeons with our modular tileset, RPG Kit, Multiple States and Tablet (useful for character sheets). 
   Great admin tools to enable or disable player permissions and to eliminate griefing in public games. 
   360° panoramic backgrounds that change the lighting and atmosphere. 
   Included games: Backgammon, Cards, Chess, Checkers, Chinese Checkers, Custom Board, Dice, Dominoes, Go, Jigsaw Puzzles, Mahjong, Pachisi, Piecepack, Poker, Reversi, RPG Kit, Sandbox, Solitaire, and Tablet.

title: Brawlhalla
VRChat
description:
In VRChat there is something around every corner that will delight, thanks to the power of true user generated content. Jump into hundreds of awe-inspiring environments and meet unique avatars every day. Watch a movie on the moon. Ride the Titanic. Step into a new world every time you come online. In VRChat, you are one of us. Enjoy your stay.

Imagine a world where anything is possible. Join a game of capture the flag in outer space. Share stories around a campfire while roasting marshmallows, then moments later experience a retro game of bowling with an alien and robot. In VRChat there is something around every corner that will delight, thanks to the power of true user generated content. Jump into hundreds of awe inspiring environments and meet unique avatars every day. Watch a movie on the moon. Ride the Titanic. Step into a new world every time you come online. In VRChat, you are one of us. Enjoy your stay.

videojuego de realidad virtual

Free-to-Play-MMOG
jogo eletrônico de mundo virtual em realidade virtual
米国の企業 VRChat Inc.によって開発・運営が行われているソーシャルVRプラットフォーム。

Imagine a world where anything is possible. Join a game of capture the flag in outer space. Share stories around a campfire while roasting marshmallows, then moments later experience a retro game of bowling with an alien and robot. In VRChat there is something around every corner that will delight, thanks to the power of true user generated content. Jump into hundreds of awe inspiring environments and meet unique avatars every day. Watch a movie on the moon. Ride the Titanic. Step into a new world every time you come online. In VRChat, you are one of us. Enjoy your stay.

Imagine a space filled with limitless possibilities.  
 
 Spend your afternoon dogfighting in fighter jets, before winding down in a treehouse that exists floating in a nebula. Make a new best friend while exploring a haunted mansion, right before playing a hand of cards with a robot, alien, and eight-foot tall wolf.
 
 In VRChat, there are hundreds of thousands of worlds, millions of avatars –  all created by the users . No matter what you’re into, there’s a space in VRChat for you. And if there isn’t, we’ll give you the tools to make your dream a reality.
 
 While not required to join in on the fun, VRChat was built to take advantage of VR headsets in many unique ways. That means avatars that flow with your movement, and systems that work alongside various hardware platforms to provide full-body tracking, finger tracking, and much, much more.
 
 There’s something magical around every corner. Come take a look, and see what you find.
 
       
 
 In VRChat, there’s always something to do – and people to meet there.
 
 Visit a planetarium and have a chat about astronomy. Go on a virtual hike through a majestic fantasy forest. Pull up to a car meet, and talk shop with some gearheads. Attend a live music event underneath a chemical storage facility, and talk obscure genres with DJs. Once you find your crowd, join their Group, and you'll be able to find them again the next time you're on.
 
 Your community –  whatever it is  – is here.
 
       
 
 There are thousands of games to play in VRChat. Try running a kitchen in a busy restaurant, or racing go-karts in zero gravity. Fancy a battle royale? We’ve got those, too -- just probably with a wider diversity of avatars than you’ve ever seen before.
 
 It doesn’t matter what you like to play: casual card games, shooters, racing, platformers, puzzles, horror, and of course, endless party games. If you want to play it, it probably exists here (and if it doesn't, you can build it yourself).
 
       
 
 Everything here was built by the community using the VRChat SDK. Combined with Unity and Udon, our in-house scripting language, we give our users as much power as possible to build whatever their imaginations can conjure up.
 
  But creation isn’t just limited to worlds. 
 
 VRChat provides a level of creative freedom that is unmatched anywhere else, and nowhere is that reflected best than on the avatars of our users. In VRChat, you can be anything, and explore your identity however you’d like. Want to be an alien? A talking dog? A sentient shoe with glowing bits that react to the beat of music by changing color? 
 
 I mean, sure, if that’s what you’re about.
 
  Come on in -- hundreds of thousands of worlds (and a whole bunch of new friends!) are waiting for you.

In VRChat, you can be anything, and explore your identity however you’d like. Want to be an alien? A talking dog? A sentient shoe with glowing bits that react to the beat of music by changing color? 
 
 I mean, sure, if that’s what you’re about.
 
  Come on in -- hundreds of thousands of worlds (and a whole bunch of new friends!) are waiting for you.

Imagine a space filled with limitless possibilities.  
 
 Spend your afternoon dogfighting in fighter jets, before winding down in a treehouse that exists floating in a nebula. Make a new best friend while exploring a haunted mansion, right before playing a hand of cards with a robot, alien, and eight-foot tall wolf.
 
 In VRChat, there are hundreds of thousands of worlds, millions of avatars –  all created by the users . No matter what you’re into, there’s a space in VRChat for you. And if there isn’t, we’ll give you the tools to make your dream a reality.
 
 While not required to join in on the fun, VRChat was built to take advantage of VR headsets in many unique ways. That means avatars that flow with your movement, and systems that work alongside various hardware platforms to provide full-body tracking, finger tracking, and much, much more.
 
 There’s something magical around every corner. Come take a look, and see what you find.
 
       
 
 In VRChat, there’s always something to do – and people to meet there.
 
 Visit a planetarium and have a chat about astronomy. Go on a virtual hike through a majestic fantasy forest. Pull up to a car meet, and talk shop with some gearheads. Attend a live music event underneath a chemical storage facility, and talk obscure genres with DJs. Once you find your crowd, join their Group, and you'll be able to find them again the next time you're on.
 
 Your community –  whatever it is  – is here.
 
       
 
 There are thousands of games to play in VRChat. Try running a kitchen in a busy restaurant, or racing go-karts in zero gravity. Fancy a battle royale? We’ve got those, too -- just probably with a wider diversity of avatars than you’ve ever seen before.
 
 It doesn’t matter what you like to play: casual card games, shooters, racing, platformers, puzzles, horror, and of course, endless party games. If you want to play it, it probably exists here (and if it doesn't, you can build it yourself).
 
       
 
 Everything here was built by the community using the VRChat SDK. Combined with Unity and Udon, our in-house scripting language, we give our users as much power as possible to build whatever their imaginations can conjure up.

brief:
In VRChat there is something around every corner that will delight, thanks to the power of true user generated content. Jump into hundreds of awe-inspiring environments and meet unique avatars every day. Watch a movie on the moon. Ride the Titanic. Step into a new world every time you come online. In VRChat, you are one of us. Enjoy your stay.

Imagine a world where anything is possible. Join a game of capture the flag in outer space. Share stories around a campfire while roasting marshmallows, then moments later experience a retro game of bowling with an alien and robot. In VRChat there is something around every corner that will delight, thanks to the power of true user generated content. Jump into hundreds of awe inspiring environments and meet unique avatars every day. Watch a movie on the moon. Ride the Titanic. Step into a new world every time you come online. In VRChat, you are one of us. Enjoy your stay.

title: ENDLESS™ Legend
description:
Special Edition   
 
  ENDLESS™ Legend includes all the Emperor Edition bonuses (minus Dungeon of the Endless - Deep Freeze):  
 
 -	Minor faction “Ice Wargs”
 -	Hero “Namkang”
 -	Unique trait for custom factions “A song of only ice”
 -	Official Digital Soundtrack by FlybyNo in mp3 format
 -	Unique badge for your Amplitude Games2Gether account
 -	Adds 200 points to the value of your votes on Games2Gether
 
   EXCLUSIVE REWARDS   
 
 Join the GAMES2GETHER community now, and receive the ENDLESS™ Legend badge (unlocks points, dozens of avatars and titles to customize your GAMES2GETHER profile)
 
    Follow  the development of the game and get to know the talent behind the scenes.
    Make your voice count  by giving feedback on the game, submitting ideas, and voting for Art and gameplay elements.
    Participate  in contests and design content that will be created by the studio and added to the game!  
  
 
  About the Game  Create your own Legend Another sunrise, another day of toil. Food must be grown, industries built, science and magic advanced, and wealth collected. Urgency drives these simple efforts, however, for your planet holds a history of unexplained apocalypse, and the winter you just survived was the worst on record. A fact that has also been true for the previous five.
 
 
 As you discover the lost secrets of your world and the mysteries of the legends and ruins that exist as much in reality as in rumor, you will come to see that you are not alone. Other peoples also struggle to survive, to grow, and perhaps even to conquer.
 
 You have a city, a loyal populace, and a few troops; your power and magic should be sufficient to keep them alive. But beyond that, nothing is certain… Where will you go, what will you find, and how will you react? Will your trail be one of roses, or of blood?
 
   Explore fantastic lands.   Lead one of eight civilizations each with a unique gameplay style and storyline.
   Survive through cold dark seasons that drive Auriga to its end. Will it also be yours?
   Experience an endless replayability with randomly generated worlds and quests.
   Set the size, shape, topography and more... to create your own world to discover.  
   Expand beyond the unknown.   Conquer, build and develop villages into feared fortresses or wonderful cities.
   Assimilate powerful minor factions and use their special traits and units wisely.
   Hire, equip and train your heroes to become army leaders or city governors.
   Raise your civilization by finding mysterious artefacts and forgotten technologies.  
   Exploit every opportunity.   Evolve your civilization through the discovery of new advanced technologies.
   Collect Dust, luxuries and strategic resources tradable on the marketplace.
   Keep one step ahead of other civilizations through trade and subtle diplomacy.
   Choose from different victory conditions and adapt your strategy on the fly.  
   Exterminate fools who defy you.   Experience an innovative dynamic simultaneous turn-based battle system.
   Use unit equipment, abilities and the terrain to overcome your opponents.
   Zoom out of a battle and rule the other aspects of your empire seamlessly.
   Define your custom civilizations and confront those created by your friends.

Edición especial    Juego digital Endless Legend   Juega a Endless Legend en PC y Mac.   Expansión «Colmillos congelados» de Endless Legend   Añade «Huargos de hielo» al conjunto de facciones menores del juego.
   Añade a «Namkang» al conjunto de héroes del juego.
   Añade la exclusiva «Canción de solo hielo» a tus facciones personalizadas.   Banda sonora digital oficial   Todos los temas de Endless Space creados por FlybyNo en formato mp3. Emblema de Amplitude «Endless Legend»   Añade un exclusivo emblema a tu cuenta de Amplitude.
   Añade 500 puntos G2G al valor de tus votos en nuestra página web.   Expansión «Congelación» de Dungeon of the Endless   Añade la nave espacial «Refrigorífica» que desbloquea un nuevo modo del juego.
   Añade a «Kreyang» al conjunto de héroes del juego.  
 
   // CAMBIA EL JUEGO   
 
 Únete ahora a la comunidad y recibe el distintivo Endless Legend (desbloquea puntos y contiene docenas de avatares y títulos para personalizar tu perfil de GAMES2GETHER).
 
 Hazte oír haciendo comentarios sobre el juego, comparte tus ideas y vota sobre los elementos artísticos y de jugabilidad. ¡Participa en concursos y diseña contenidos que el estudio creará y añadirá al juego!
 
  
 
  Acerca del juego   Crea tu propia leyenda Otro amanecer, otro día de esfuerzo. Hay que cultivar comida, levantar industrias, avanzar en la ciencia y la magia y crear riqueza. Y todo esto es urgente, ya que tu planeta acumula una historia de apocalipsis inexplicables y el invierno que acabas de sobrevivir ha sido el peor que se recuerda. Un hecho que se ha repetido en los cinco anteriores.
 
 
 A medida que profundices en los secretos perdidos de tu mundo y los misterios de las leyendas y las ruinas que existen tanto en la realidad como en la imaginación, descubrirás que no estás solo. Otros pueblos ansían sobrevivir, crecer y, quizás, conquistar.
 
 Tienes una ciudad, una población leal y unos cuantos soldados: tu poder y tu magia deben bastar para mantenerlos vivos. Pero aparte de eso, no hay ninguna certeza... ¿Adónde irás, qué encontrarás, cómo reaccionarás? ¿Será un camino de rosas o de espinas?
 
   Explora fantásticos territorios.   Lidera a una de las ocho civilizaciones, cada una con su propia trama y estilo de juego.
   Sobrevive a las estaciones frías y oscuras que conducen a Auriga a su final. ¿Será también el tuyo?
   Juega una y otra vez sin límites con mundos y personajes generados aleatoriamente.
   Configura el tamaño, la forma, la topografía y mucho más... para crear tu propio mundo y descubrirlo.  
   Expándete más allá de lo conocido.   Conquista, construye y desarrolla aldeas para convertirlas en temibles fortalezas o hermosas ciudades.
   Asimila facciones menores poderosas y aprovecha sus características y unidades especiales con sensatez.
   Contrata, equipa y entrena a tus héroes para convertirlos en jefes militares o gobernadores de ciudades.
   Levanta tu civilización encontrando misteriosos artefactos y tecnologías olvidadas.  
   Aprovecha cada oportunidad que te surja.   Desarrolla tu civilización mediante el descubrimiento de nuevas tecnologías avanzadas.
   Recoge Polvo y recursos de lujo y estratégicos intercambiables en el mercado.
   Mantente un paso por delante del resto de las civilizaciones mediante el comercio y la diplomacia sutil.
   Elige entre diferentes condiciones de victoria y adapta tu estrategia sobre la marcha.  
   Extermina a los insensatos que te desafíen.   Experimenta un sistema de combate a la vez innovador y dinámico basado en turnos.
   Utiliza el equipo de las unidades, las habilidades y el terreno para superar a tus rivales.
   Abandona una batalla y considera los otros aspectos de tu imperio con sutileza.
   Define tus civilizaciones personalizadas y enfréntate a las creadas por tus amigos.

Édition spéciale    Le jeu digital Endless Legend   Jouez à Endless Legend sur PC et Mac.   L’add-on "Frozen Fangs" pour Endless Legend   Ajoute la faction mineure “Wargs de Glace” au jeu.
   Ajoute le héros Drakken Namkang à l’équipe des héros du jeu.
   Ajoute un trait unique “Un chant de glace épicétou” pour vos factions personnalisables.   La bande-son numérique officielle   Toutes les pistes Endless Legend créées par FlybyNo au format mp3.   Le Badge Amplitude ”Endless Legend”   Ajoute un badge unique à votre compte Amplitude.
   Ajoute 500 points G2G à la valeur de vos votes sur notre site internet.   L’add-on "Deep-Freeze" pour Dungeon of the Endless   Ajoute le vaisseau “Refreezerator” qui débloque un nouveau mode de jeu.
   Ajoute Kreyang à l’équipe des héros du jeu.  
 
   // CHANGEZ LE JEU   
 
 Rejoignez la communauté et recevez le badge Endless Legend (débloque des points, des dizaines d'avatars et des titres pour personnaliser votre profil GAMES2GETHER).
 
 Faites entendre votre voix en donnant votre avis sur le jeu, en partageant vos idées et en votant pour les éléments artistiques et de gameplay. Participez à des concours et concevez du contenu qui sera créé par le studio et ajouté au jeu !
 
  
 
  À propos du jeu   Créez votre propre Légende Chaque lever de soleil est synonyme d'une nouvelle journée de labeur. Les champs doivent être cultivés, les bâtiments doivent être achevés, la science et la magie doivent vous faire avancer, et les richesses doivent être collectées. L'urgence conduit ces simples efforts, mais prenez garde, car votre planète a été témoin d'une mystérieuse apocalypse, et l'hiver auquel vous venez de survivre a été le pire de tous. Quoique ce fut également le cas des cinq précédents.
 
 
 Alors que vous découvrirez les secrets perdus de votre planète, ainsi que les mystérieuses légendes et ruines Endless, vous allez vous rendre compte que vous n'êtes pas seuls. D'autres peuples ont survécu, ont évolué et sont même peut-être prêts à partir en guerre.
 
 Vous possédez une ville, un peuple qui vous est loyal mais aussi quelques troupes ; vos ressources magiques ainsi que votre pouvoir devraient vous permettre de les garder en vie. Au delà de cela, rien n'est sûr… Où irez-vous, qu'allez-vous y trouver, et comment réagirez-vous ? Votre sentier sera-t-il fait de roses ou de sang ?
 
   Explorez des terres merveilleuses.   Contrôlez et dirigez une des huit civilisations disponibles, avec chacune un style de jeu et une histoire unique.
   Tentez de survivre aux terribles hivers qui conduisent Auriga vers sa fin. Et peut-être la vôtre ?
   Une rejouabilité infinie avec des options de génération aléatoire de mondes et de quêtes.
   Choisissez vos paramètres et créez un monde unique à découvrir : taille, forme, topographie et beaucoup d'autres options.  
   Étendez-vous vers l'inconnu.   Partez à la conquête et construisez des villages, puis transformez-les en de redoutables forteresses ou fabuleuses cités.
   Assimilez de puissantes factions mineures et utilisez leurs traits et unités avec sagesse.
   Engagez, équipez et entraînez vos héros, afin d'en faire les meilleurs généraux ou gouverneurs.
   Faites grandir votre civilisation en partant à la recherche d'artefacts mystérieux et technologies jusqu'alors perdues.  
   Exploitez toutes les opportunités qui s'offrent à vous.   Faites évoluer votre civilisation grâces à la découverte de technologies avancées.
   Collectez de la Brume, des ressources de luxe et stratégiques échangeables sur la place du marché.
   Gardez une longueur d'avance sur les autres civilisations en faisant des échanges commerciaux ou de subtils accords diplomatiques.
   Choisissez une ou plusieurs conditions de victoire en fonction de votre style de jeu.  
   Exterminez ceux qui osent vous défier.   Un système de bataille innovant et dynamique en tour par tour simultané.
   Utilisez à votre avantage les équipements et capacités de vos unités mais aussi les terrains pour écraser vos adversaires.
   Dézoomez lors d'une bataille et continuez à gérer votre empire sans attendre.
   Créez vos propres factions et affrontez celles créées par vos amis.

Sonderedition    Digital Spiel „Endless Legend”   Spielen Endless Legend auf PC und Mac.   „Frozen Fangs” Add-on für Endless Legend   Fügt dem Spiel die Nebenfraktion der Eiswargs hinzu.
   Fügt dem Spiel den Helden Namkang hinzu
   Fügt eine einzigartige „Das Lied von Eis nur” Eigenschaft für deine benutzerdefinierten Fraktionen   Offizieller digitaler Soundtrack   Alle von FlybyNo komponierten Tracks aus „Endless Legend” als mp3.   „Endless Legend” Amplitude Abzeichen   Du erhältst ein einzigartiges Abzeichen für dein Amplitude-Konto.
   Fügt 500 G2G zum Wert deiner Stimmabgaben auf unserer Webseite hinzu.   „Deep-Freeze” Add-on für Dungeon of the Endless   Fügt das Kühlerator-Schiff, das ein neuer Modus für das Spiel beinhaltet.
   Fügt Kreyang im Spiel als Held zur Auswahl.  
 
   // VERÄNDERE DAS SPIEL   
 
 Werde jetzt Teil der Community und erhalte das Abzeichen „Endless Legend“ (schaltet Punkte, Dutzende von Avataren und Titeln für dein GAMES2GETHER-Profil frei).
 
 Beteilige dich und gib Rückmeldung zum Spiel, teile deine Ideen oder stimme für grafische Elemente und Spielmechaniken ab. Nimm an Wettbewerben teil und designe Inhalte, die das Studio dann entwickelt und ins Spiel einbindet!
 
  
 
  Infos zum Spiel   Erschaffe deine eigene Legende Ein neuer Sonnenaufgang, ein neuer Tag voller Arbeit ... Du musst Nahrung anbauen, Industrie errichten, Wissenschaft und Magie erforschen und Reichtum anhäufen. Viel Zeit hast du jedoch nicht, denn dein Planet wird schon seit langem von unerklärlichen Katastrophen heimgesucht. Der letzte Winter war der härteste in der Geschichte ... genau genommen gilt das auch für die fünf Winter davor.
 
 
 Während du die verlorenen Geheimnisse deiner Welt und die Mysterien der Legenden und Ruinen, die du bisher nur aus Märchen kanntest, erkundest, wird dir klar werden, dass du nicht alleine bist. Andere Völker kämpfen ebenfalls darum, zu überleben, zu wachsen und vielleicht sogar neue Gebiete zu erobern.
 
 Du hast eine Stadt, eine loyale Bevölkerung und ein paar Truppen. Deine Macht und deine Magie sollten ausreichen, um sie alle am Leben zu erhalten. Abgesehen davon ist die Zukunft ungewiss. Wohin wirst du gehen, was wirst du finden und wie wirst du handeln? Wirst du eine Spur aus Rosenblättern legen oder eine blutige Schneise schlagen?
 
   Erkunde fantastische Länder.   Herrsche über eine von acht Zivilisationen mit einzigartigen Spielstilen und Hintergrundgeschichten.
   Überlebe in den kalten, dunklen Jahreszeiten, die Auriga dem Untergang weihen. Werden sie auch dein Untergang sein?
   Erlebe eine endlose Wiederspielbarkeit mit zufällig generierten Welten und Quests.
   Stelle Größe, Form, Landschaft und vieles mehr ein, um deine eigene erforschbare Welt zu erschaffen.  
   Vergrößere dein Reich und stoße ins Unbekannte vor!   Erobere, baue und verwandle Dörfer in gefürchtete Festungen oder wunderschöne Städte.
   Assimiliere mächtige Nebenfraktionen in dein Reich und nutze ihre besonderen Eigenschaften und Einheiten weise.
   Heure Helden an, rüste sie aus und trainiere sie, damit sie deine Armeen anführen oder deine Städte regieren.
   Finde geheimnisvolle Artefakte und vergessene Technologien, um deine Zivilisation zu verbessern.  
   Nutze jede Gelegenheit aus.   Entwickle deine Zivilisation durch die Entdeckung neuer, fortschrittlicher Technologien weiter.
   Sammle Dust, Luxusgüter und strategische Ressourcen, mit denen du auf dem Markt handeln kannst.
   Sei den anderen Zivilisationen durch Handel und diplomatisches Geschick immer einen Schritt voraus.
   Wähle zwischen verschiedenen Siegesbedingungen und passe deine Strategie kurzfristig jeder neuen Situation an.  
   Vernichte die Narren, die sich dir widersetzen.   Erlebe ein innovatives, dynamisches, simultanes und rundenbasiertes Kampfsystem.
   Nutze Fertigkeiten, Ausrüstung für deine Einheiten und das Gelände, um deine Feinde zu besiegen.
   Zoome aus der Schlacht, um übergangslos andere Aspekte deines Imperiums zu verwalten.
   Erstelle benutzerdefinierte Zivilisationen und stelle dich den von deinen Freunden erschaffenen entgegen.

Edição especial   
 
  ENDLESS™ Legend includes all the Emperor Edition bonuses (minus Dungeon of the Endless - Deep Freeze):  
 
 -	Minor faction “Ice Wargs”
 -	Hero “Namkang”
 -	Unique trait for custom factions “A song of only ice”
 -	Official Digital Soundtrack by FlybyNo in mp3 format
 -	Unique badge for your Amplitude Games2Gether account
 -	Adds 200 points to the value of your votes on Games2Gether
 
   EXCLUSIVE REWARDS   
 
 Join the GAMES2GETHER community now, and receive the ENDLESS™ Legend badge (unlocks points, dozens of avatars and titles to customize your GAMES2GETHER profile)
 
    Follow  the development of the game and get to know the talent behind the scenes.
    Make your voice count  by giving feedback on the game, submitting ideas, and voting for Art and gameplay elements.
    Participate  in contests and design content that will be created by the studio and added to the game!  
  
 
  Acerca do jogo  Create your own Legend Another sunrise, another day of toil. Food must be grown, industries built, science and magic advanced, and wealth collected. Urgency drives these simple efforts, however, for your planet holds a history of unexplained apocalypse, and the winter you just survived was the worst on record. A fact that has also been true for the previous five.
 
 
 As you discover the lost secrets of your world and the mysteries of the legends and ruins that exist as much in reality as in rumor, you will come to see that you are not alone. Other peoples also struggle to survive, to grow, and perhaps even to conquer.
 
 You have a city, a loyal populace, and a few troops; your power and magic should be sufficient to keep them alive. But beyond that, nothing is certain… Where will you go, what will you find, and how will you react? Will your trail be one of roses, or of blood?
 
   Explore fantastic lands.   Lead one of eight civilizations each with a unique gameplay style and storyline.
   Survive through cold dark seasons that drive Auriga to its end. Will it also be yours?
   Experience an endless replayability with randomly generated worlds and quests.
   Set the size, shape, topography and more... to create your own world to discover.  
   Expand beyond the unknown.   Conquer, build and develop villages into feared fortresses or wonderful cities.
   Assimilate powerful minor factions and use their special traits and units wisely.
   Hire, equip and train your heroes to become army leaders or city governors.
   Raise your civilization by finding mysterious artefacts and forgotten technologies.  
   Exploit every opportunity.   Evolve your civilization through the discovery of new advanced technologies.
   Collect Dust, luxuries and strategic resources tradable on the marketplace.
   Keep one step ahead of other civilizations through trade and subtle diplomacy.
   Choose from different victory conditions and adapt your strategy on the fly.  
   Exterminate fools who defy you.   Experience an innovative dynamic simultaneous turn-based battle system.
   Use unit equipment, abilities and the terrain to overcome your opponents.
   Zoom out of a battle and rule the other aspects of your empire seamlessly.
   Define your custom civilizations and confront those created by your friends.

Edizione speciale    Gioco digitale Endless Legend   Gioca a Endless Legend su PC e Mac.   Addon Endless Legend "Zanne congelate"   Aggiunge “Warg di Ghiaccio” alle fazioni minori del gioco.
   Aggiunge Namkang agli eroi del gioco.
   Aggiunge “Il trono di ghiaccio” ai tratti caratteristici delle tue fazioni.   Colonna sonora ufficiale digitale   Tutte le tracce di Endless Legend create da FlybyNo in formato mp3.   Distintivo Amplitude ”Endless Legend”   Aggiunge un distintivo unico al tuo account Amplitude.
   Aggiunge 500 G2G al valore dei tuoi voti sul nostro sito Web.    Addon Dungeon of the Endless “Gelo Profondo”   Aggiunge la navicella spaziale  “Assideratore” che sblocca una nuova modalità di gioco.
   Aggiunge Kreyang agli eroi del gioco. 
 
   EXCLUSIVE REWARDS   Join the GAMES2GETHER community now, and receive the ENDLESS™ Legend badge (unlocks points, dozens of avatars and titles to customize your GAMES2GETHER profile)   Follow  the development of the game and get to know the talent behind the scenes.
    Make your voice count  by giving feedback on the game, submitting ideas, and voting for Art and gameplay elements.
    Participate  in contests and design content that will be created by the studio and added to the game!   
 
  Informazioni sul gioco   Crea la tua leggenda Una nuova alba, un nuovo giorno di duro lavoro. Cibo da coltivare, industrie da costruire, scienza e magia da far progredire e ricchezza da accumulare. C'è una certa urgenza però che spinge questi semplici compiti, poiché il tuo pianeta serba una storia di inspiegabili apocalissi e l'inverno al quale sei da poco scampato è stato il peggiore che si ricordi. Una circostanza che lo accomuna ai cinque precedenti.Mentre scopri gli antichi segreti del tuo mondo e i misteri delle leggende e delle rovine che esistono tanto nella realtà quanto nelle leggende, realizzerai di non essere solo. Altre persone lottano per sopravvivere, crescere e, forse, anche conquistare.Hai una città, una popolazione fedele e alcune truppe; il tuo potere, insieme alla magia, dovrebbero essere sufficienti a mantenerli in vita. Ma oltre a questo, nulla è certo… Dove andrai, cosa troverai e come reagirai? Il tuo cammino sarà cosparso di petali di rose o di sangue?  Esplora terre fantastiche.   Guida una delle otto civiltà, ognuna con una propria storia e un diverso stile di gioco.
   Sopravvivi a fredde stagioni oscure che minacciano la fine di Auriga. Sarà la fine anche per te?
   Prova il piacere del gioco senza fine, con mondi e obiettivi illimitati generati casualmente.
   Decidi dimensione, forma, topografia e molto altro… per creare il tuo mondo tutto da scoprire.    Espandi il tuo dominio oltre l'ignoto.   Conquista, costruisci e trasforma i villaggi in terribili fortezze o città meravigliose.
   Assorbi potenti fazioni minori e sfrutta saggiamente le loro peculiarità.
   Recluta, equipaggia e allena i tuoi eroi a diventare comandanti d'esercito o governatori cittadini.
   Trova manufatti misteriosi e tecnologie da tempo dimenticate per sviluppare la tua civiltà.    Sfrutta ogni opportunità.   Incentiva l'evoluzione della tua civiltà sviluppando nuove tecnologie all'avanguardia.
   Raccogli il Dust, oggetti preziosi e risorse strategiche da scambiare al mercato.
   Assicurati di restare un passo avanti alle altre civiltà grazie al commercio e a un'astuta diplomazia.
   Scegli tra diverse condizioni di vittoria e adatta la tua strategia.    Annienta i pazzi che osano sfidarti.   Sperimenta un sistema di battaglia simultaneo a turni innovativo e dinamico.
   Usa l'equipaggiamento delle unità, le competenze e il terreno per sopraffare i tuoi avversari.
   Allontanati momentaneamente da una battaglia e governa gli altri aspetti del tuo impero senza interruzioni.
   Dai forma alla tua civiltà e confrontala con quelle create dai tuoi amici.

title: War Thunder
description:
War Thunder  is the most comprehensive free-to-play, cross-platform, MMO military game dedicated to aviation, armoured vehicles, from the early 20th century to the most advanced modern combat units. Join now and take part in major battles on land, in the air, and at sea, fighting with millions of players from all over the world in an ever-evolving environment.
 
       
 
 In War Thunder, aircraft, attack helicopters, ground forces and naval ships collaborate in realistic competitive battles. You can choose from over 2,500 vehicles and an extensive variety of combat situations many of which are exclusive. You can find yourself blasting your pursuers from a bomber turret, defending your teammates on the ground from an air raid with anti-aircraft guns, shooting down enemy planes with a firestorm from multiple rocket launchers, or trying to sink an enemy warship with a torpedo from a fast attack boat.
 
        Features include: 
   Seamless cross-platform gameplay between Windows PC, Linux, Mac, PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, Xbox One with Xbox Series X|S – everyone on the same server.
   Over 2,500 highly detailed aircraft, helicopters, tanks, warships and other combat vehicles crafted carefully from historical documents and surviving sources.
   100 maps representing the main historical battle theaters.
   Intense PvP experiences in full-scale combat missions at various difficulty settings for all play styles and degrees of experience.
   Rich PvE content including dynamic historical campaigns and solo missions.
   Regular content updates including new vehicles, maps, missions and nations.
   Astonishing graphics, authentic sound effects and beautiful music creating an atmosphere to fully immerse yourself in.
   Create custom content for War Thunder and share it on War Thunder Live, with the prospect of earning real money through the Revenue Share Partner System!

localized_description.text:
War Thunder 是Windows、Linux、Mac、PlayStation®4、PlayStation®5、Xbox One及Xbox Series S|X平台上最全面的免费、跨平台大型和Xbox One平台上最全面的免费、跨平台大型多人在线军事类游戏，专注于二战和冷战时期的航空、装甲车辆和海军舰艇。现在就加入进来参与在地面、天空和海洋进行的主要战事，并和来自全球各地的几百万玩家们在不断变化的环境中战斗。
 
       
 
 在War Thunder中，飞机、武装直升机、地面部队和海军舰艇将会在历史性的战场上协同作战，有超过2500种载具可供选择，其中有不少是独家载具，您可以操纵轰炸机的自卫炮塔内击毁追击您的敌机，驾驶高射炮保护您的队友免遭空袭，使用多种火箭发射器击落敌机，或用驾驶快艇用鱼雷击沉敌人的战舰。
 
        游戏特色： 
   超过2500款细节丰富的飞机、直升机、坦克、军舰和其他载具，均通过历史文献和幸存资料来源精心制作。
   100多张表现历史上发生的主要战事的地图。
   玩家之间的高强度对抗，在全面的战斗任务中可以设置不同难度以体现多种多样的游戏风格和水平。
   丰富的人机对抗内容，其中包括动态的历史战役和个人任务。
   定期更新内容，包括新载具、地图、任务和国家。
   惊人的画质，真实的音效和优美的背景音乐创造了一个能够让您沉浸其中的世界。
   无缝衔接的跨平台游戏体验，Windows，Linux，Max，PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, Xbox One 和 Xbox Series X|S，所有玩家都能在一个服务器上畅玩。
   为War Thunder定制优异的内容并在 War Thunder Live上面分享，并有机会获得现金作为奖励！

 在 War Thunder 中 ， 飞机 、 武装 直升机 、 地面部队 和 海军 艇艇 将会 在 历史性 的 战场 上 协同 作战 ， 有 超过 2500 种 载 具 可供 选择 ， 其 可供 选择 是 独家 载 具 ， 您 可以 操纵 轰炸机 的自卫 炮塔 内 击毁 追击 您 的 敌机 ， 驾驶 高射炮 保护 您 的 队友 免遭 空袭 ， 使用 多种 火箭 发射 器 击落 敌机 ， 或 用 驾驶 快艇 用 鱼雷 击沉 敌人 的 战战。
